### GET /analytics/202405/shop/performance

- Summary: GetShopPerformance
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Returns performance metrics at shop/seller level.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Analytics_202405_GetShopPerformance_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| start_date_ge | query | yes | string | Start date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone. In the parameter name, "ge" refers to "greater than or equal to" (inclusive) |
| end_date_lt | query | yes | string | End date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone. In the parameter name, "lt" refers to "less than" (exclusive) |
| with_comparison | query | no | boolean | Whether previous period data is returned for comparison. Available values: true, false Default value: false The previous period has the same length and granularity as the current period with end time being the same as the start time of the current period. E... |
| granularity | query | no | string | Granularity of the data. Available values: ALL, 1D Default value: ALL * ALL: aggregate * 1D: daily |
| currency | query | no | string | Currency. Available values: USD, LOCAL Default value: LOCAL * USD: US dollars * LOCAL: local currency where the shop is located |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

### GET /analytics/202405/shop_products/performance

- Summary: GetShopProductPerformanceList
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Returns a list of product performance metrics.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Analytics_202405_GetShopProductPerformanceList_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| start_date_ge | query | yes | string | Start date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone. In the parameter name, "ge" refers to "greater than or equal to" (inclusive) |
| end_date_lt | query | yes | string | End date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone. In the parameter name, "lt" refers to "less than" (exclusive) |
| page_size | query | no | integer:int64 | Number of products per page. Max value: 100 Default value: 10 |
| sort_field | query | no | string | Sort on. Available values: gmv, order_count, unit_sold_count, click_through_rate Default value: gmv |
| sort_order | query | no | string | Sort direction. Available values: ASC, DESC Default value: DESC * ASC: ascending * DESC: descending |
| currency | query | no | string | Currency. Available values: USD, LOCAL Default value: LOCAL * USD: US dollars * LOCAL: local currency where the shop is located |
| page_token | query | no | string | Page token, indicating the current position. Used for requesting next page data. Leave this field empty for first time queries. |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Analytics_202405_GetShopProductPerformanceList_Response_Data | no | Analytics_202405_GetShopProductPerformanceList_Response_Data |  |
| data.latest_available_date | string | no |  | Latest date in local timezone where data is ready (ISO 8601 format). |
| data.next_page_token | string | no |  | Page token for the next page request. |
| data.products | array<Analytics_202405_GetShopProductPerformanceList_Response_Data_Products> | no |  | List of product performance metrics. |
| data.products[].click_through_rate | string | no |  | Ratio of the number of product clicks compared to number of product impressions in raw decimal format. To calculate the percentage, multiple it by 100%. Example: 0.0528 <=> 5.28% |
| data.products[].gmv | Analytics_202405_GetShopProductPerformanceList_Response_Data_Products_Gmv | no | Analytics_202405_GetShopProductPerformanceList_Response_Data_Products_Gmv |  |
| data.products[].gmv.amount | string | no |  | GMV amount in the corresponding currency. |
| data.products[].gmv.currency | string | no |  | GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP). |
| data.products[].id | integer:int64 | no |  | Product ID |
| data.products[].orders | integer:int64 | no |  | Total (sum of all) orders for the product. |
| data.products[].units_sold | integer:int64 | no |  | Number of units sold for the product. |
| data.total_count | integer:int32 | no |  | Total number of products. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

- Summary: GetShopSKUPerformanceList
- Operation ID: `-`

| name | in | required | type | description |

| end_date_lt | query | yes | string | End time (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone, exclusive. |
| page_size | query | no | integer:int64 | Number of records per page. The maximum page_size value is 100 |
| sort_field | query | no | string | Sort field, possible values: - gmv (default) - sku_orders - units_sold |
| sort_order | query | no | string | Sort direction, possible values: - DESC (default) - ASC |
| page_token | query | no | string | Page token, indicating the current position. The page_token is empty by default, indicating first position. |
| product_id | query | no | string | Filter SKUs by product ID. If a product_id is provided, the API will only return SKUs for the given product ID, otherwise it will return all SKUs for the shop |
| currency | query | no | string | Currency: - USD: US dollars - LOCAL (default): Local currency where the shop is located |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

_None._

### GET /analytics/202508/shop_lives/performance

- Summary: GetShopLIVEPerformanceList
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Returns a list of LIVE stream sessions and associated metrics for a shop.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Analytics_202508_GetShopLIVEPerformanceList_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| start_date_ge | query | yes | string | Start date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone. In the parameter name, "ge" refers to "greater than or equal to" (inclusive) |
| end_date_lt | query | yes | string | End date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone. In the parameter name, "lt" refers to "less than" (exclusive) |
| page_size | query | no | integer:int32 | Number of products per page. Max value: 100 Default value: 10 |
| sort_field | query | no | string | Field to sort on. Default: gmv Available values: - gmv - products_added - different_products_sold - sku_orders - unit_sold - customers - 24h_live_gmv |
| sort_order | query | no | string | Sort direction. Available values: ASC, DESC Default value: DESC |
| currency | query | no | string | Currency. Available values: USD, LOCAL Default value: LOCAL |
| page_token | query | no | string | Page token, indicating the current position. Used for requesting next page data. Leave this field empty for first time queries. |
| account_type | query | no | string | Types of the accounts under which videos were created. Available values: ALL, OFFICIAL_ACCOUNTS, MARKETING_ACCOUNTS, AFFILIATE_ACCOUNTS Default value: ALL |
| shop_cipher | query | yes | string | Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/pa... |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Analytics_202508_GetShopLIVEPerformanceList_Response_Data | no | Analytics_202508_GetShopLIVEPerformanceList_Response_Data |  |
| data.latest_available_date | string | no |  | Latest date in local timezone where data is ready (ISO 8601 format). |
| data.live_stream_sessions | array<Analytics_202508_GetShopLIVEPerformanceList_Response_Data_LiveStreamSessions> | no |  | List of live performance metrics. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].end_time | string | no |  | End time of the LIVE, unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].id | string | no |  | ID of the LIVE |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].interaction_performance | Analytics_202508_GetShopLIVEPerformanceList_Response_Data_LiveStreamSessions_InteractionPerformance | no | Analytics_202508_GetShopLIVEPerformanceList_Response_Data_LiveStreamSessions_InteractionPerformance |  |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].interaction_performance.acu | integer:int64 | no |  | Average concurrent users |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].interaction_performance.avg_viewing_duration | string | no |  | The average time each user spent watching LIVEs. Total viewing time divided by number of views, in seconds. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].interaction_performance.click_through_rate | string | no |  | The percentage of viewers who clicked on product links after seeing them in this LIVE. Number of clicks divided by the number of views, multiplied by 100. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].interaction_performance.comments | integer:int64 | no |  | Number of comments on the LIVE video posted during the selected period. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].interaction_performance.likes | integer:int64 | no |  | The number of likes a LIVE video received during the selected time period. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].interaction_performance.new_followers | integer:int64 | no |  | The number of viewers who followed creators from the video during the selected period. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].interaction_performance.pcu | integer:int64 | no |  | Peak concurrent users |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].interaction_performance.product_clicks | integer:int64 | no |  | Number of product clicks during the LIVE video posted during the selected period, including clicks on product lists and product cards. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].interaction_performance.product_impressions | integer:int64 | no |  | Number of product impressions during the LIVE video posted during the selected period, including product lists and product cards |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].interaction_performance.shares | integer:int64 | no |  | Number of times the LIVE video posted during the selected period were shared. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].interaction_performance.viewers | integer:int64 | no |  | Number of unique viewers of the LIVE video posted during the selected period. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].interaction_performance.views | integer:int64 | no |  | Number of views for the LIVE video posted during the selected period. |

| data.live_stream_sessions[].sales_performance.24h_live_gmv.amount | string | no |  | GMV amount in the corresponding currency. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].sales_performance.24h_live_gmv.currency | string | no |  | GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP). |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].sales_performance.avg_price | Analytics_202508_GetShopLIVEPerformanceList_Response_Data_LiveStreamSessions_SalesPerformance_AvgPrice | no | Analytics_202508_GetShopLIVEPerformanceList_Response_Data_LiveStreamSessions_SalesPerformance_AvgPrice |  |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].sales_performance.avg_price.amount | string | no |  | The average price paid for all items divided by the number of items sold. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].sales_performance.avg_price.currency | string | no |  | GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP). |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].sales_performance.click_to_order_rate | string | no |  | The percentage of customers who clicked product links from this LIVE and purchased those products. Number of purchases divided by the number of product clicks, multiplied by 100. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].sales_performance.created_sku_orders | integer:int64 | no |  | The total number of orders created during the selected period, including those with pending payment for cash-on-delivery or PayLater. Example: If a customer orders 3 units of SKU A and 2 units of SKU B, the SKU orders would be 2. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].sales_performance.customers | integer:int64 | no |  | The total number of customers who placed orders directly from this LIVE. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].sales_performance.different_products_sold | integer:int64 | no |  | The number of products for which sales were generated from the livestream |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].sales_performance.gmv | Analytics_202508_GetShopLIVEPerformanceList_Response_Data_LiveStreamSessions_SalesPerformance_Gmv | no | Analytics_202508_GetShopLIVEPerformanceList_Response_Data_LiveStreamSessions_SalesPerformance_Gmv |  |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].sales_performance.gmv.amount | string | no |  | GMV amount in the corresponding currency. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].sales_performance.gmv.currency | string | no |  | GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP). |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].sales_performance.products_added | integer:int64 | no |  | The number of products added to the LIVE. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].sales_performance.sku_orders | integer:int64 | no |  | The total number of paid orders from this LIVE during the selected period. This includes SKUs that represent unique product variations like size, colour or model. Example: If a customer orders 3 units of SKU A and 2 units of SKU B, the SKU orders would be 2. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].sales_performance.unit_sold | integer:int64 | no |  | The total number of individual items sold from all LIVEs. Example: If a customer buys 3 units of SKU A and 2 units of SKU B, the items sold would be 5. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].start_time | string | no |  | Start time of the LIVE, unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].title | string | no |  | Title of the LIVE |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].username | string | no |  | The host's username |
| data.next_page_token | string | no |  | Page token for the next page request. |
| data.total_count | integer:int64 | no |  | Total number of LIVE stream sessions. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### GET /analytics/202509/shop/performance

- Summary: GetShopPerformance
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Returns performance metrics at shop/seller level.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Analytics_202509_GetShopPerformance_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| start_date_ge | query | yes | string | Start date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone. In the parameter name, "ge" refers to "greater than or equal to" (inclusive) |
| end_date_lt | query | yes | string | End date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone. In the parameter name, "lt" refers to "less than" (exclusive) |
| granularity | query | no | string | Granularity of the data. Available values: ALL, 1D Default value: ALL * ALL: aggregate * 1D: daily |
| currency | query | no | string | Currency. Available values: USD, LOCAL Default value: LOCAL * USD: US dollars * LOCAL: local currency where the shop is located |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

_None._

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| data.latest_available_date | string | no |  | Latest date in local timezone where data is ready (ISO 8601 format). |
| data.performance | Analytics_202509_GetShopPerformance_Response_Data_Performance | no | Analytics_202509_GetShopPerformance_Response_Data_Performance |  |

| data.performance.intervals[].sales.gmv | Analytics_202509_GetShopPerformance_Response_Data_Performance_Intervals_Sales_Gmv | no | Analytics_202509_GetShopPerformance_Response_Data_Performance_Intervals_Sales_Gmv |  |

| data.performance.intervals[].sales.gross_revenue.breakdowns | array<Analytics_202509_GetShopPerformance_Response_Data_Performance_Intervals_Sales_GrossRevenue_Breakdowns> | no |  | Revenue breakdowns. |

| data.performance.intervals[].sales.items_sold | integer:int64 | no |  | The total number of individual items sold. Example: If a customer buys 3 units of SKU A and 2 units of SKU B, the items sold would be 5. |
| data.performance.intervals[].sales.orders_count | integer:int64 | no |  | The number of paid orders during the selected period. |
| data.performance.intervals[].sales.refunds | Analytics_202509_GetShopPerformance_Response_Data_Performance_Intervals_Sales_Refunds | no | Analytics_202509_GetShopPerformance_Response_Data_Performance_Intervals_Sales_Refunds |  |

### GET /analytics/202509/shop_lives/overview_performance

- Description: Returns overall performance metrics for all LIVE stream sessions under a certain shop.

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| end_date_lt | query | yes | string | End date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone. In the parameter name, "lt" refers to "less than" (exclusive) |
| today | query | no | boolean | If "today" is set to true, start_date_ge and end_date_lt will be overwritten. The response will contain real-time metrics of today (local time) |
| granularity | query | no | string | Granularity of the data. Available values: ALL, 1D Default value: ALL |
| currency | query | no | string | Currency. Available values: USD, LOCAL Default value: LOCAL |
| account_type | query | no | string | Types of the accounts under which videos were created. Available values: ALL, OFFICIAL_ACCOUNTS, MARKETING_ACCOUNTS, AFFILIATE_ACCOUNTS Default value: ALL |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

### GET /analytics/202509/shop_lives/performance

- Summary: GetShopLIVEPerformanceList
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Returns a list of LIVE stream sessions and associated metrics for a shop. Sellers can only query room ID data for their own official creator accounts.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Analytics_202509_GetShopLIVEPerformanceList_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| start_date_ge | query | yes | string | Start date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone. In the parameter name, "ge" refers to "greater than or equal to" (inclusive) |
| end_date_lt | query | yes | string | End date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone. In the parameter name, "lt" refers to "less than" (exclusive) |
| page_size | query | no | integer:int32 | Number of products per page. Max value: 100 Default value: 10 |
| sort_field | query | no | string | Field to sort on. Default: gmv Available values: - gmv - products_added - different_products_sold - sku_orders - items_sold - customers - 24h_live_gmv |
| sort_order | query | no | string | Sort direction. Available values: ASC, DESC Default value: DESC |
| currency | query | no | string | Currency. Available values: USD, LOCAL Default value: LOCAL |
| page_token | query | no | string | Page token, indicating the current position. Used for requesting next page data. Leave this field empty for first time queries. |
| account_type | query | no | string | Types of the accounts under which videos were created. Available values: ALL, OFFICIAL_ACCOUNTS, MARKETING_ACCOUNTS, AFFILIATE_ACCOUNTS Default value: ALL |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

_None._

| data.live_stream_sessions[].interaction_performance.product_impressions | integer:int64 | no |  | Number of product impressions during the LIVE video posted during the selected period, including product lists and product cards |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].interaction_performance.shares | integer:int64 | no |  | Number of times the LIVE video posted during the selected period were shared. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].interaction_performance.viewers | integer:int64 | no |  | Number of unique viewers of the LIVE video posted during the selected period. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].interaction_performance.views | integer:int64 | no |  | Number of views for the LIVE video posted during the selected period. |

Example: If a customer orders 3 units of SKU A and 2 units of SKU B, the SKU orders would be 2. |

| data.live_stream_sessions[].sales_performance.items_sold | integer:int64 | no |  | The total number of individual items sold from all LIVEs. Example: If a customer buys 3 units of SKU A and 2 units of SKU B, the items sold would be 5. |
| data.live_stream_sessions[].sales_performance.products_added | integer:int64 | no |  | The number of products added to the LIVE. |

| data.performance.intervals[].cancel_and_refunds.canceled | integer:int64 | no |  | Canceled refers to units included in orders that were either "Unpaid" or "Awaiting Shipment." |
| data.performance.intervals[].cancel_and_refunds.refunded | integer:int64 | no |  | Refunded refers to units that were refunded but not returned. |
| data.performance.intervals[].cancel_and_refunds.replacements | integer:int64 | no |  | Replacements refers to units that were returned and replaced. |
| data.performance.intervals[].cancel_and_refunds.returned | integer:int64 | no |  | Returned refers to units that were returned and refunded. |

| data.performance.intervals[].sales.orders | integer:int64 | no |  | Total (sum of all) orders for the product. |
| data.performance.intervals[].start_date | string | no |  | Start date of the interval (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone, inclusive. |

| data.performance.top_contents[].type | string | no |  | Possible values： - LIVE - VIDEO |
| data.performance.top_creators | array<Analytics_202509_GetShopProductPerformanceDetail_Response_Data_Performance_TopCreators> | no |  | brief report of product related creator within the choosen start_date_ge and end_date_ge. sorted by gmv, only return the top 100. |

| data.performance.top_creators[].creator_open_id | string | no |  | Creator/s open id, use this open id to identify the unique creator. |

### GET /analytics/202509/shop_skus/performance

- Summary: GetShopSKUPerformanceList
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Returns a list of SKU performance metrics.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Analytics_202509_GetShopSKUPerformanceList_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| start_date_ge | query | yes | string | Start time (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone, inclusive. |
| end_date_lt | query | yes | string | End time (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone, exclusive. |
| page_size | query | no | integer:int64 | Number of records per page. The maximum page_size value is 100 |
| page_token | query | no | string | Page token, indicating the current position. The page_token is empty by default, indicating first position. |
| sort_field | query | no | string | Sort field, possible values: - gmv (default) - sku_orders - units_sold |
| sort_order | query | no | string | Sort direction, possible values: - DESC (default) - ASC |
| category_filter | query | no | array<string> | Category id array |
| product_status_filter | query | no | string | LIVE INACTIVE ALL (default) |
| product_ids | query | no | array<string> | Filter SKUs by product IDs. If product_ids are provided, the API will only return SKUs for the given product IDs, otherwise it will return all SKUs for the shop |
| currency | query | no | string | Currency: - USD: US dollars - LOCAL (default): Local currency where the shop is located |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Analytics_202509_GetShopSKUPerformanceList_Response_Data | no | Analytics_202509_GetShopSKUPerformanceList_Response_Data |  |
| data.latest_available_date | string | no |  | Latest date in local timezone where data is ready (ISO 8601 format). |
| data.next_page_token | string | no |  | Page token for the next page request. |
| data.skus | array<Analytics_202509_GetShopSKUPerformanceList_Response_Data_Skus> | no |  | List of SKU performance metrics. |
| data.skus[].gmv | Analytics_202509_GetShopSKUPerformanceList_Response_Data_Skus_Gmv | no | Analytics_202509_GetShopSKUPerformanceList_Response_Data_Skus_Gmv |  |
| data.skus[].gmv.amount | string | no |  | GMV amount in the corresponding currency. |
| data.skus[].gmv.currency | string | no |  | GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP). |
| data.skus[].id | integer:int64 | no |  | SKU ID |
| data.skus[].product_id | integer:int64 | no |  | Product ID |
| data.skus[].sku_orders | integer:int64 | no |  | Total (sum of all) orders for a SKU |
| data.skus[].units_sold | integer:int64 | no |  | Number of units sold for a SKU |
| data.total_count | integer:int32 | no |  | Total number of SKUs. |

| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### GET /analytics/202509/shop_videos/overview_performance

- Summary: GetShopVideoPerformanceOverview
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Returns overall performance metrics for all videos under a shop.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Analytics_202509_GetShopVideoPerformanceOverview_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| start_date_ge | query | yes | string | Start date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone. In the parameter name, "ge" refers to "greater than or equal to" (inclusive) |
| end_date_lt | query | yes | string | End date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone. In the parameter name, "lt" refers to "less than" (exclusive) |
| today | query | no | boolean | If "today" is set to true, start_date_ge and end_date_lt will be overwritten. The response will contain real-time metrics of today (local time) |
| granularity | query | no | string | Granularity of the data. Available values: ALL, 1D Default value: ALL * ALL: aggregate * 1D: daily |
| currency | query | no | string | Currency. Available values: USD, LOCAL Default value: LOCAL * USD: US dollars * LOCAL: local currency where the shop is located |
| account_type | query | no | string | Types of the accounts under which videos were created. Available values: ALL, OFFICIAL_ACCOUNTS, MARKETING_ACCOUNTS, AFFILIATE_ACCOUNTS Default value: ALL - ALL: all account types - OFFICIAL_ACCOUNTS, - MARKETING_ACCOUNTS, - AFFILIATE_ACCOUNTS |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Analytics_202509_GetShopVideoPerformanceOverview_Response_Data | no | Analytics_202509_GetShopVideoPerformanceOverview_Response_Data |  |
| data.latest_available_date | string | no |  | Latest date in local timezone where data is ready (ISO 8601 format). |
| data.performance | Analytics_202509_GetShopVideoPerformanceOverview_Response_Data_Performance | no | Analytics_202509_GetShopVideoPerformanceOverview_Response_Data_Performance |  |
| data.performance.intervals | array<Analytics_202509_GetShopVideoPerformanceOverview_Response_Data_Performance_Intervals> | no |  | Interval data for the requested time range. The time range of each interval is determined by the granularity. |
| data.performance.intervals[].avg_customers | integer:int64 | no |  | Daily average number of customers. |
| data.performance.intervals[].click_through_rate | string | no |  | Ratio of the number of product clicks compared to number of video views in raw decimal format. To calculate the percentage, multiple it by 100%. Example: 0.0528 <=> 5.28% |
| data.performance.intervals[].end_date | string | no |  | End date of the interval (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone, exclusive. |
| data.performance.intervals[].gmv | Analytics_202509_GetShopVideoPerformanceOverview_Response_Data_Performance_Intervals_Gmv | no | Analytics_202509_GetShopVideoPerformanceOverview_Response_Data_Performance_Intervals_Gmv |  |
| data.performance.intervals[].gmv.amount | string | no |  | GMV amount in the corresponding currency. |
| data.performance.intervals[].gmv.currency | string | no |  | GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP). |
| data.performance.intervals[].product_clicks | integer:int64 | no |  | The number of product clicks from the video. |
| data.performance.intervals[].product_impressions | integer:int64 | no |  | The number of impressions of all video products. |
| data.performance.intervals[].sku_orders | integer:int64 | no |  | The total number of paid SKU orders placed directly from all shoppable videos. |
| data.performance.intervals[].start_date | string | no |  | Start date of the interval (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone, inclusive. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

| data.videos[].gmv | Analytics_202509_GetShopVideoPerformanceList_Response_Data_Videos_Gmv | no | Analytics_202509_GetShopVideoPerformanceList_Response_Data_Videos_Gmv |  |

### GET /analytics/202509/shop_videos/{video_id}/products/performance

- Summary: GetShopVideoProductPerformanceList
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Returns performance metrics for a list of products promoted in a given video.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Analytics_202509_GetShopVideoProductPerformanceList_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| video_id | path | yes | string | Video ID |
| end_date_lt | query | yes | string | End date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone. In the parameter name, "lt" refers to "less than" (exclusive) |
| page_size | query | no | integer:int32 | Number of products per page. Max value: 100 Default value: 10 |
| sort_field | query | no | string | Sort on. Available values: gmv, units_sold, daily_avg_buyers Default value: gmv |
| sort_order | query | no | string | Sort direction. Available values: ASC, DESC Default value: DESC * ASC: ascending * DESC: descending |
| currency | query | no | string | Currency. Available values: USD, LOCAL Default value: LOCAL * USD: US dollars * LOCAL: local currency where the shop is located |
| page_token | query | no | string | Page token, indicating the current position. Used for requesting next page data. Leave this field empty for first time queries. |
| start_date_ge | query | yes | string | Start date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone. In the parameter name, "ge" refers to "greater than or equal to" (inclusive) |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Analytics_202509_GetShopVideoProductPerformanceList_Response_Data | no | Analytics_202509_GetShopVideoProductPerformanceList_Response_Data |  |
| data.latest_available_date | string | no |  | Latest date in local timezone where data is ready (ISO 8601 format). |
| data.next_page_token | string | no |  | Page token for the next page request. |
| data.products | array<Analytics_202509_GetShopVideoProductPerformanceList_Response_Data_Products> | no |  | List of product performance metrics. |
| data.products[].daily_avg_buyers | string | no |  | Average number of buyers per day for the current product. |
| data.products[].gmv | Analytics_202509_GetShopVideoProductPerformanceList_Response_Data_Products_Gmv | no | Analytics_202509_GetShopVideoProductPerformanceList_Response_Data_Products_Gmv |  |
| data.products[].gmv.amount | string | no |  | GMV amount in the corresponding currency. |
| data.products[].gmv.currency | string | no |  | GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP). |
| data.products[].id | string | no |  | Product ID |
| data.products[].name | string | no |  | Product Name |
| data.products[].units_sold | integer:int64 | no |  | Number of units sold for the current product. |
| data.total_count | integer:int64 | no |  | Total number of videos. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

- Summary: GetShopPerformancePerHour

| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

_None._

| field | type | required | schema | description |

| data.performance.intervals | array<Analytics_202510_GetShopPerformancePerHour_Response_Data_Performance_Intervals> | no |  | intervals data |
| data.performance.intervals[].customers | integer:int64 | no |  | The number of individual customers who made a purchase. This metric counts each customer once, even if they made multiple purchases. |
| data.performance.intervals[].gmv | Analytics_202510_GetShopPerformancePerHour_Response_Data_Performance_Intervals_Gmv | no | Analytics_202510_GetShopPerformancePerHour_Response_Data_Performance_Intervals_Gmv |  |

| data.performance.overall.gmv.currency | string | no |  | GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP). |

### GET /analytics/202510/shop_lives/{live_id}/performance_per_minutes

- Summary: GetShopLIVEPerformancePerMinutes
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Get the Live session performance break down to every minutes, after the live session is finished. This API only returns data of live streams hosted by shop official account or marketing account.

| currency | query | no | string | USD or LOCAL |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |

| data.performance.intervals[].interactions.comment_rate | string | no |  | Total number of comments during the LIVE divided by the number of views. |

| data.performance.intervals[].interactions.new_followers | integer:int64 | no |  | Number of viewers who followed creator from the LIVE video |
| data.performance.intervals[].interactions.share_rate | string | no |  | Total number of times the LIVE was shared divided by the total number of views. |

| data.performance.intervals[].traffic.ctr | string | no |  | The number of clicks divided by numbers of views of the LIVE during selected time period including clicks on product lists and product cards |
| data.performance.intervals[].traffic.enter_room_rate | string | no |  | LIVE views per LIVE room impressions. |
| data.performance.intervals[].traffic.impressions | integer:int64 | no |  | The total number of times the LIVE was displayed to viewers. |
| data.performance.intervals[].traffic.product_clicks | integer:int64 | no |  | Total number of product link clicks from LIVE streams, including product list and product card clicks. |

### GET /analytics/202511/creators/bestselling

- Summary: GetBestsellingCreators
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Get the top 100 performing creators of the target date range
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Analytics_202511_GetBestsellingCreators_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| date | query | yes | string | The reference date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in the shop’s registered timezone. The query will calculate data backwards from this specified date based on the time_slot parameter (e.g., if time_slot is 7D, it returns data for the 7 days ending on this dat... |
| time_slot | query | yes | string | Specifies the query time range. Supported values are: - 1D — query data for 1 day - 7D — query data for 7 days - 30D — query data for 30 days This field determines the maximum range that can be queried using the date field. |
| author_type | query | yes | string | The creator's user type. This is an enumerated type with values: OFFICIAL, CHANNEL, AFFILIATE If not provided, it will default to all. |
| currency | query | no | string | USD or LOCAL |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Analytics_202511_GetBestsellingCreators_Response_Data | no | Analytics_202511_GetBestsellingCreators_Response_Data |  |
| data.creators | array<Analytics_202511_GetBestsellingCreators_Response_Data_Creators> | no |  | creators |
| data.creators[].followers_count | integer:int64 | no |  | Number of followers |
| data.creators[].gmv_range | string | no |  | Gmv range of the creator |

### GET /analytics/202512/shop/{live_id}/products_performance

- Summary: GetShopLIVEProductsPerformanceList
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Shop related LIVE session (official account & marketing accounts） Sale performance of each product
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Analytics_202512_GetShopLIVEProductsPerformanceList_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| live_id | path | yes | string | TTS LIVE session ID |
| sort_order | query | no | string | Sort direction. Available values: ASC, DESC Default value: DESC |
| sort_field | query | no | string | Field to sort on. Default: gmv Available values: - direct_gmv - items_sold - customers - created_sku_orders - sku_orders - main_orders - product_impressions - produt_clicks |
| currency | query | no | string | USD or LOCAL |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Analytics_202512_GetShopLIVEProductsPerformanceList_Response_Data | no | Analytics_202512_GetShopLIVEProductsPerformanceList_Response_Data |  |
| data.products | array<Analytics_202512_GetShopLIVEProductsPerformanceList_Response_Data_Products> | no |  | Overall performance data for the video. |
| data.products[].id | string | no |  | Product id |
| data.products[].name | string | no |  | Product name |
| data.products[].sales | Analytics_202512_GetShopLIVEProductsPerformanceList_Response_Data_Products_Sales | no | Analytics_202512_GetShopLIVEProductsPerformanceList_Response_Data_Products_Sales |  |
| data.products[].sales.avg_price | Analytics_202512_GetShopLIVEProductsPerformanceList_Response_Data_Products_Sales_AvgPrice | no | Analytics_202512_GetShopLIVEProductsPerformanceList_Response_Data_Products_Sales_AvgPrice |  |
| data.products[].sales.avg_price.amount | string | no |  | GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP). |
| data.products[].sales.avg_price.currency | string | no |  | GMV amount in the corresponding currency. |
| data.products[].sales.created_sku_orders | integer:int64 | no |  | The total number of SKU orders created directly from the LIVE for this product. |
| data.products[].sales.customers | integer:int64 | no |  | The total numbers of customers who ordered this product directly from the LIVE, including customers who made returns or refunds. |
| data.products[].sales.direct_gmv | Analytics_202512_GetShopLIVEProductsPerformanceList_Response_Data_Products_Sales_DirectGmv | no | Analytics_202512_GetShopLIVEProductsPerformanceList_Response_Data_Products_Sales_DirectGmv |  |
| data.products[].sales.direct_gmv.amount | string | no |  | GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP). |
| data.products[].sales.direct_gmv.currency | string | no |  | GMV amount in the corresponding currency. |
| data.products[].sales.items_sold | integer:int64 | no |  | The number of product items sold |
| data.products[].sales.main_orders | integer:int64 | no |  | Total number of paid main orders placed. Main orders refer to the single purchase transaction a customer makes. |
| data.products[].sales.payment_rate | string | no |  | Main order paid / Main order created of this product |
| data.products[].sales.sku_orders | integer:int64 | no |  | The total number of paid SKU orders placed directly from the LIVE for this product. |
| data.products[].traffic | Analytics_202512_GetShopLIVEProductsPerformanceList_Response_Data_Products_Traffic | no | Analytics_202512_GetShopLIVEProductsPerformanceList_Response_Data_Products_Traffic |  |
| data.products[].traffic.add_to_cart_count | integer:int64 | no |  | The number of times viewers add the product to their cart. |
| data.products[].traffic.click_to_order_rate | Analytics_202512_GetShopLIVEProductsPerformanceList_Response_Data_Products_Traffic_ClickToOrderRate | no | Analytics_202512_GetShopLIVEProductsPerformanceList_Response_Data_Products_Traffic_ClickToOrderRate |  |
| data.products[].traffic.click_to_order_rate.main_order_ctor | string | no |  | Percentage of times viewers who clicked LIVE product links also placed a main order. |
| data.products[].traffic.click_to_order_rate.sku_order_ctor | string | no |  | The percentage of times viewers clicked product links in LIVE streams and placed a direct order. |
| data.products[].traffic.ctr | string | no |  | Click-through rate: The number of product clicks for this product from the LIVE video, divided by the number of product impressions for this product from the LIVE video, including product clicks and product impressions for product lists and product cards |
| data.products[].traffic.gpm | Analytics_202512_GetShopLIVEProductsPerformanceList_Response_Data_Products_Traffic_Gpm | no | Analytics_202512_GetShopLIVEProductsPerformanceList_Response_Data_Products_Traffic_Gpm |  |
| data.products[].traffic.gpm.watch_gpm | string | no |  | The Watch GPM is the average GMV generated from 1,000 views of the LIVE. |
| data.products[].traffic.product_impressions | integer:int64 | no |  | Number of product impressions for this product during the LIVE video, including for product lists and product cards |
| data.products[].traffic.produt_clicks | integer:int64 | no |  | The total number of times the product was clicked from this LIVE, including from the product list and product card |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

- Summary: GetShopProductPerformanceList

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| end_date_lt | query | yes | string | End date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone. In the parameter name, "lt" refers to "less than" (exclusive) |
| page_size | query | no | integer:int64 | Number of products per page. Max value: 100 Default value: 10 |
| page_token | query | no | string | Page token, indicating the current position. Used for requesting next page data. Leave this field empty for first time queries. |
| sort_field | query | no | string | Field to sort on. Default: gmv Available values: - gmv - items_sold - orders |
| sort_order | query | no | string | Sort direction. Available values: ASC, DESC Default value: DESC * ASC: ascending * DESC: descending |
| currency | query | no | string | Currency. Available values: USD, LOCAL Default value: LOCAL * USD: US dollars * LOCAL: local currency where the shop is located |
| category_filter | query | no | array<string> | Category id array |
| product_status_filter | query | no | string | LIVE INACTIVE ALL (default) |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

### GET /analytics/202605/shop_videos/performance

- Summary: GetShopVideoPerformanceList
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Returns a list of videos and associated metrics for a shop.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Analytics_202605_GetShopVideoPerformanceList_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| start_date_ge | query | yes | string | Start date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone. In the parameter name, "ge" refers to "greater than or equal to" (inclusive) |
| end_date_lt | query | yes | string | End date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone. In the parameter name, "lt" refers to "less than" (exclusive) |
| page_size | query | no | integer:int32 | Number of products per page. Max value: 100 Default value: 10 |
| sort_field | query | no | string | Sort on. Default value: gmv Available values: - gmv - gpm - avg_customers - sku_orders - items_sold - views - click_through_rate |
| sort_order | query | no | string | Sort direction. Available values: ASC, DESC Default value: DESC * ASC: ascending * DESC: descending |
| currency | query | no | string | Currency. Available values: USD, LOCAL Default value: LOCAL * USD: US dollars * LOCAL: local currency where the shop is located |
| page_token | query | no | string | Page token, indicating the current position. Used for requesting next page data. Leave this field empty for first time queries. |
| account_type | query | no | string | Types of the accounts under which videos were created. Available values: ALL, OFFICIAL_ACCOUNTS, MARKETING_ACCOUNTS, AFFILIATE_ACCOUNTS Default value: ALL - ALL: all account types - OFFICIAL_ACCOUNTS, - MARKETING_ACCOUNTS, - AFFILIATE_ACCOUNTS |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Analytics_202605_GetShopVideoPerformanceList_Response_Data | no | Analytics_202605_GetShopVideoPerformanceList_Response_Data |  |
| data.latest_available_date | string | no |  | Latest date in local timezone where data is ready (ISO 8601 format). |
| data.next_page_token | string | no |  | Page token for the next page request. |
| data.total_count | integer:int64 | no |  | Total number of videos. |
| data.videos | array<Analytics_202605_GetShopVideoPerformanceList_Response_Data_Videos> | no |  | List of video performance metrics. |
| data.videos[].avg_customers | integer:int64 | no |  | Daily average customers |
| data.videos[].click_through_rate | string | no |  | Ratio of the number of product clicks compared to number of video views in raw decimal format. To calculate the percentage, multiple it by 100%. Example: 0.0528 <=> 5.28% |
| data.videos[].creator | Analytics_202605_GetShopVideoPerformanceList_Response_Data_Videos_Creator | no | Analytics_202605_GetShopVideoPerformanceList_Response_Data_Videos_Creator |  |
| data.videos[].creator.author_type | string | no |  | The creator's user type. This is an enumerated type with values: OFFICIAL, CHANNEL, AFFILIATE |
| data.videos[].creator.nick_name | string | no |  | Creator handle. |
| data.videos[].creator.open_id | string | no |  | Creator's open id, use this open id to identify a creator. |
| data.videos[].creator.user_name | string | no |  | Creator user name. |
| data.videos[].duration | integer:int64 | no |  | Video duration in seconds |
| data.videos[].gmv | Analytics_202605_GetShopVideoPerformanceList_Response_Data_Videos_Gmv | no | Analytics_202605_GetShopVideoPerformanceList_Response_Data_Videos_Gmv |  |
| data.videos[].gmv.amount | string | no |  | GMV amount in the corresponding currency. |
| data.videos[].gmv.currency | string | no |  | GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP). |
| data.videos[].gpm | Analytics_202605_GetShopVideoPerformanceList_Response_Data_Videos_Gpm | no | Analytics_202605_GetShopVideoPerformanceList_Response_Data_Videos_Gpm |  |
| data.videos[].gpm.amount | string | no |  | GMV amount in the corresponding currency. |
| data.videos[].gpm.currency | string | no |  | GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP). |
| data.videos[].hash_tags | array<string> | no |  | The hash tags of the video |
| data.videos[].hash_tags[] | string | no |  |  |
| data.videos[].id | string | no |  | Video ID |
| data.videos[].items_sold | integer:int64 | no |  | Number of units sold from the current video. |
| data.videos[].products | array<Analytics_202605_GetShopVideoPerformanceList_Response_Data_Videos_Products> | no |  | List of products promoted in the video. |
| data.videos[].products[].id | string | no |  | Product ID. |
| data.videos[].products[].name | string | no |  | Product Name. |
| data.videos[].sku_orders | integer:int64 | no |  | The total number of paid SKU orders placed directly from the current video. |
| data.videos[].title | string | no |  | Video Title |
| data.videos[].username | string | no |  | User name. |
| data.videos[].video_post_time | string | no |  | Date and time video was posted (ISO 8601 format) |
| data.videos[].views | integer:int64 | no |  | Number of video views during the selected time range. |

## authorization_v202309

| method | path | summary |
| --- | --- | --- |
| GET | `/authorization/202309/shops` | GetAuthorizedShops |

### GET /authorization/202309/shops

- Summary: GetAuthorizedShops
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Retrieves the list of shops that a seller has authorized for an app. Seller authorization is required before an app can access the data of a shop. Use this API to check which shops are currently authorized for an app and obtain the corresponding shop cipher for use as an input parameter in shop related APIs. For more information about seller authorization, refer to [Seller authorization guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a344ddec3030b238fa0). Target seller: All
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Authorization_202309_GetAuthorizedShops_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Authorization_202309_GetAuthorizedShops_Response_Data | no | Authorization_202309_GetAuthorizedShops_Response_Data |  |
| data.shops | array<Authorization_202309_GetAuthorizedShops_Response_Data_Shops> | no |  | The list of shops that a seller has authorized for the app. |
| data.shops[].cipher | string | no |  | An encrypted token used to securely identify a shop in API requests. There is no need for decryption on the receiving end. |
| data.shops[].code | string | no |  | The TikTok Shop code, which is also displayed on Seller Center. |
| data.shops[].id | string | no |  | An internal identifier for the TikTok Shop. |
| data.shops[].name | string | no |  | The TikTok Shop name. |
| data.shops[].region | string | no |  | The region of the shop. |
| data.shops[].seller_type | string | no |  | The type of seller. Possible values: - CROSS_BORDER: Cross border sellers with multiple shops in different countries. - LOCAL: Local sellers with only 1 shop. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

## data_reconciliation_v202309

| method | path | summary |

| POST | `/data_reconciliation/202309/orders/sync` | OrderStatusDataExchange |

### POST /data_reconciliation/202309/orders/sync

- Summary: OrderStatusDataExchange
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: TikTok Shop-Connector exchange order data from DTC(Direct To Consumer) platform to Tiktok Shop-QE system to compare the order data of DTC platform and Tiktok Shop. Which systems of users are involved with the API? For example, DTC platform Connector App, Shipping App, WMS, PIM, Multi Channel App, etc.
- Request schema: `DataReconciliation_202309_OrderStatusDataExchange_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `DataReconciliation_202309_OrderStatusDataExchange_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| shop_id | query | no | integer:int64 | Tiktok shop seller shop id. |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| orders | array<DataReconciliation_202309_OrderStatusDataExchange_RequestBody_Orders> | no |  | The exchange order list |
| orders[].channel_financial_status | string | no |  | If 'channel_type' is SHOPIFY,the financial status enumeration, data not in the following enumeration will return an error. shopify financial status: PENDING AUTHORIZED OVERDUE EXPIRING EXPIRED PAID REFUNDED PARTIALLY_REFUNDED PARTIALLY_PAID VOIDED UNPAID |
| orders[].channel_fulfillment_status | string | no |  | If 'channel_type' is SHOPIFY,the fulfillment status enumeration, data not in the following enumeration will return an error. Shopify fulfillment status: FULFILLED ON_HOLD PARTIALLY_FULFILLED UNFULFILLED SCHEDULED |
| orders[].channel_order_id | string | no |  | Direct To Consumer System order id |
| orders[].channel_order_status | string | no |  | The order status enumeration under the corresponding 'channel_type', and an error will be returned for data outside the enumeration under the 'channel_type'. The correspondence between 'channel_type' and order status is as follows. 1. channel_type is 'SHOPI... |
| orders[].channel_order_update_time | string | no |  | The update timestamp of the order on the DTC, not the current api call time. Unit: second, the length must be 10. The value must less than current timestamp. |
| orders[].channel_type | string | no |  | DTC channel type enumeration, data not in the following enumeration will return an error: SHOPIFY WOOCOMMERCE BIGCOMMERCE MAGENTO |
| orders[].not_exist_reason | string | no |  | The reason of that there is no matched order in channel platform |
| orders[].order_id | string | no |  | Tiktok shop's order id, must be a pure numeric string. |
| orders[].packages | array<DataReconciliation_202309_OrderStatusDataExchange_RequestBody_Orders_Packages> | no |  | the package information list of order |
| orders[].packages[].logistics_provider_name | string | no |  | The provider name of tracking info |
| orders[].packages[].package_id | string | no |  | The tracking corresponding Tiktok shop package id |
| orders[].packages[].tracking_number | string | no |  | Tracking number of tracking info |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | DataReconciliation_202309_OrderStatusDataExchange_Response_Data | no | DataReconciliation_202309_OrderStatusDataExchange_Response_Data |  |
| data.errors | array<DataReconciliation_202309_OrderStatusDataExchange_Response_Data_Errors> | no |  | The list of errors that occurred from executing the mutation, one failed order one element |
| data.errors[].code | string | no |  | Integartion err code |
| data.errors[].detail | DataReconciliation_202309_OrderStatusDataExchange_Response_Data_Errors_Detail | no | DataReconciliation_202309_OrderStatusDataExchange_Response_Data_Errors_Detail |  |
| data.errors[].detail.channel_order_id | string | no |  | Failed channel order id |
| data.errors[].detail.channel_type | string | no |  | Failed channel type |
| data.errors[].detail.extra_errors | array<DataReconciliation_202309_OrderStatusDataExchange_Response_Data_Errors_Detail_ExtraErrors> | no |  | Failed order reasons |
| data.errors[].detail.extra_errors[].code | string | no |  | Business err code |
| data.errors[].detail.extra_errors[].message | string | no |  | Business err message |
| data.errors[].detail.order_id | string | no |  | Failed Tiktok Shop order id |
| data.errors[].message | string | no |  | Integartion err message |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

## event_v202309

| method | path | summary |

| PUT | `/event/202309/webhooks` | UpdateShopWebhook |

### DELETE /event/202309/webhooks

- Summary: DeleteShopWebhook
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Deletes the shop's webhook URL for a specific event topic. Regardless of whether webhook is configured or not, the result will return success.
- Request schema: `Event_202309_DeleteShopWebhook_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Event_202309_DeleteShopWebhook_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| event_type | string | no |  | The topic of the webhook event. Possible values: - `ORDER_STATUS_CHANGE`: Triggers on each order status update, from new order placement through all subsequent status changes. See [Order Status change](650300b8a57708028b430b4a). - `RECIPIENT_ADDRESS_UPDATE`... |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | object | no |  |  |
| data | object | no |  |  |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### GET /finance/202309/orders/{order_id}/statement_transactions

- Summary: GetTransactionsbyOrder
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: **This API is currently exclusive to the following markets: US, UK.** Retrieves the transactions associated with an order, including both order-level transactions and SKU-level detailed transactions. This covers all transactions related to sales, fees, commissions, shipping, taxes, adjustments, and refunds.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Finance_202309_GetTransactionsbyOrder_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| order_id | path | yes | string | The order ID in TikTok Shop. |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

| data.statement_transactions[].currency | string | no |  | The currency code in ISO 4217 format. |

### GET /finance/202309/payments

- Summary: GetPayments
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: **This API is currently unavailable to SEA markets.** Retrieves records of automated payments for a shop based on a specified date range. Use the returned list to verify and reconcile payments with the transactions in the seller's bank account.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Finance_202309_GetPayments_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| create_time_lt | query | no | integer:int64 | Filter payments to show only those that occurred before the specified date and time. Unix timestamp. Refer to notes in `create_time_ge` for more usage information. |
| page_size | query | no | object:int8 | The number of results to be returned per page. Default: 20 Valid range: [1-100] |
| page_token | query | no | string | An opaque token used to retrieve the next page of a paginated result set. Retrieve this value from the result of the `next_page_token` from a previous response. It is not needed for the first page. |
| sort_field | query | yes | string | The returned results will be sorted by the specified field. Only supports `create_time`. |
| sort_order | query | no | string | The sort order for the `sort_field` parameter. Default: ASC Possible values: - ASC: Ascending order - DESC: Descending order |
| create_time_ge | query | no | integer:int64 | Filter payments to show only those that occurred on or after the specified date and time. Unix timestamp. **Note:** `create_time_ge` and `create_time_lt` together constitute the creation time filter condition. - If `create_time_ge` is filled but `create_tim... |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

### GET /finance/202309/statements

- Summary: GetStatements
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Retrieves the statements generated for a shop and the key statement information based on a specified date range or their payment status. Use this API to get an overview of your daily statements over a range of time, or to find out which statements have been paid or not. For the detailed transactions, refer to [Get Statement Transactions](650a6749defece02be67da87) or [Get Order Statement Transactions](650a6734defece02be67d724). Applicable for all regions' sellers. Only data after 2023-07-01 is available.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Finance_202309_GetStatements_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| statement_time_lt | query | no | integer:int64 | Filter statements to show only those that are generated before the specified date and time. Unix timestamp. Refer to notes in `statement_time_ge` for more usage information. |
| payment_status | query | no | string | Filter statements based on the payment status. Possible values: - PAID: Payment has been transferred to the seller. - FAILED: Payment transfer failed. - PROCESSING: Payment is currently being processed. Default: All statuses are returned. |
| page_size | query | no | object:int8 | The number of results to be returned per page. Default: 20 Valid range: [1-100] |
| page_token | query | no | string | An opaque token used to retrieve the next page of a paginated result set. Retrieve this value from the result of the `next_page_token` from a previous response. It is not needed for the first page. |
| sort_field | query | yes | string | The returned results will be sorted by the specified field. Only supports `statement_time`. |
| sort_order | query | no | string | The sort order for the `sort_field` parameter. Default: ASC Possible values: - ASC: Ascending order - DESC: Descending order |
| statement_time_ge | query | no | integer:int64 | Filter statements to show only those that are generated on or after the specified date and time. Unix timestamp. **Note:** `statement_time_ge` and `statement_time_le` together constitute the creation time filter condition. - If `statement_time_ge` is filled... |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| data.statements[].currency | string | no |  | The currency code in ISO 4217 format. |

| data.statements[].id | string | no |  | The statement ID. |

Possible values: - PAID: Payment has been transferred to the seller. - FAILED: Payment transfer failed. - PROCESSING: Payment is currently being processed. |
| data.statements[].payment_time | integer:int64 | no |  | The Unix payment timestamp |

### GET /finance/202309/statements/{statement_id}/statement_transactions

- Summary: GetTransactionsbyStatement
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Only for UK and US local sellers. Get a list of transactions based on statement_id. We will return a list of orders. If you require the SKU level transaction details, pass in the order_id to Get Order Statement Transactions.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Finance_202309_GetTransactionsbyStatement_Response`

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| page_token | query | no | string | The default is empty string |
| sort_field | query | yes | string | Only support: order_create_time |
| sort_order | query | no | string | The default is ASC, the developer can choose ASC or DESC |
| page_size | query | no | object:int8 | The default is 20. It must be a positive integer,the range is 1-100 |

| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |

## finance_v202501

| method | path | summary |
| --- | --- | --- |

### GET /finance/202501/orders/{order_id}/statement_transactions

- Summary: GetTransactionsbyOrder
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Retrieves the SKU-level details of an order transaction. This covers transactions related to sales, fees, commissions, shipping, taxes, and refunds. Applicable for all regions' sellers. Only data after 2023-07-01 is available (Please note that for US cross-border sellers, data before 2025-04-30 is unavailable).
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Finance_202501_GetTransactionsbyOrder_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| order_id | path | yes | string | The order ID in TikTok Shop. |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Finance_202501_GetTransactionsbyOrder_Response_Data | no | Finance_202501_GetTransactionsbyOrder_Response_Data |  |
| data.currency | string | no |  | The three-digit currency code in ISO 4217 format. |
| data.fee_and_tax_amount | string | no |  | The fees and taxes charged by the platform for the order at the time of order settlement. Shipping-related costs are excluded. |
| data.order_create_time | integer:int64 | no |  | The creation time of the order. Unix timestamp. |
| data.order_id | string | no |  | The order ID in TikTok Shop. |
| data.revenue_amount | string | no |  | The revenue amount for the order at the time of order settlement. This is equivalent to the net sales amount. |
| data.settlement_amount | string | no |  | The settlement amount for the order. Formula: revenue_amount - shipping_cost_amount - fee_tax_amount |
| data.shipping_cost_amount | string | no |  | The shipping costs for the order at the time of order settlement. |
| data.sku_transactions | array<Finance_202501_GetTransactionsbyOrder_Response_Data_SkuTransactions> | no |  | The list of SKU transaction records for the order. |

| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown | Finance_202501_GetTransactionsbyOrder_Response_Data_SkuTransactions_FeeTaxBreakdown | no | Finance_202501_GetTransactionsbyOrder_Response_Data_SkuTransactions_FeeTaxBreakdown |  |

| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.affiliate_commission_deposit | string | no |  | The amount reserved for creator commissions after an order is paid. Applies only to commissions tied to order volume and is based on the highest earning rate. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.affiliate_commission_release | string | no |  | The commission deposit refunded to you after order settlement. Applies only to commissions tied to order volume. |

| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.installation_service_fee | string | no |  | The fee TikTok Shop charges you for using platform installation service |

| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.live_specials_fee_amount | string | no |  | The service fee charged for participation in the [LIVE Specials Programme]. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.mall_service_fee_amount | string | no |  | The service fee charged for using TikTok Shop Mall. |

| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.platform_semi_managed_commission_fee | string | no |  | Calculated as a percentage of (original price − seller discount + customer-paid shipping fee). |

| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.platform_special_service_fee_amount | string | no |  | The portion of the Distance Shipping Fee paid by the customer that exceeds the logistics service provider's charge, retained by TikTok Shop to support a secure fulfillment experience |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.pre_order_service_fee_amount | string | no |  | The service fee charged when seller joins Pre-order program. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.referral_fee_amount | string | no |  | The referral fee charged for processing successful orders. Applicable only for the US. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.refund_administration_fee_amount | string | no |  | The 20% refund administration fee deducted from the total refunded referral fee amount. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.seller_growth_fee_amount | string | no |  | A fee charged on each successful order to provide Bonus Cashback and other growth benefits. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.seller_paylater_handling_fee_amount | string | no |  | The handling fee charged to the seller for participation in the PayLater program. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.sfp_service_fee_amount | string | no |  | The service fee charged for participation in the [Seller Free Shipping Programme]. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.shipping_fee_guarantee_service_fee | string | no |  | A flat service fee charged for each order under the Shipping Fee Guarantee Program |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.smart_promotion_fee_amount | string | no |  | This fee includes funds from TikTok Shop to help provide promotions to customers |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.tap_shop_ads_commission | string | no |  | The advertising commission cost a merchant pays to TikTok Shop Affiliate Partner (TAP). |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.transaction_fee_amount | string | no |  | The transaction fee charged for processing successful orders. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.tsp_commission_amount | string | no |  | The commission amount charged by TikTok Shop Partners (TSP). |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.vn_fix_infrastructure_fee | string | no |  | Infrastructure fees are a fixed service fee that TikTok Shop charges for providing, maintaining, and developing infrastructure for delivery services. It applies to delivered orders on the main order level. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.fee.voucher_xtra_service_fee_amount | string | no |  | The service fee charged for participation in the Voucher Xtra program. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.tax | Finance_202501_GetTransactionsbyOrder_Response_Data_SkuTransactions_FeeTaxBreakdown_Tax | no | Finance_202501_GetTransactionsbyOrder_Response_Data_SkuTransactions_FeeTaxBreakdown_Tax |  |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.tax.anti_dumping_duty_amount | string | no |  | The anti-dumping duties collected by governments for import goods. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.tax.cedular_tax | string | no |  | The Mexican Guanajuato cedular tax |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.tax.customs_clearance_amount | string | no |  | The fees charged by logistic suppliers for customs clearance services. Applicable only for cross-border shop orders. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.tax.customs_duty_amount | string | no |  | The customs duties, a type of tax on cross-border goods collected by governments. Applicable only for cross-border shop orders. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.tax.gst_amount | string | no |  | The goods and services tax (GST) collected and remitted to the tax authority by the platform for low-value goods imported into Singapore, effective January 1, 2023. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.tax.import_vat_amount | string | no |  | The import VAT, a tax paid on goods bought in one country and imported into another. Applicable only for cross-border shop orders. In Japan, it refers to the Japan Consumption Tax (JCT). |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.tax.isr_amount | string | no |  | The Mexican federal income tax that TikTok Shop is required to withhold. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.tax.iva_amount | string | no |  | The Mexican VAT that TikTok Shop is required to withhold on your taxable products and remit to the tax authority. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.tax.local_vat_amount | string | no |  | The VAT paid by the platform on the seller's behalf. Applicable only for local shop orders. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.tax.pit_amount | string | no |  | The personal income tax (PIT) paid by the platform on the seller's behalf. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.tax.sales_tax_referral_fee_amount | string | no |  | Some U.S. states consider referral fees taxable. To comply with state tax laws, TikTok Inc. collects and remits applicable sales tax when a taxable fee is charged. |
| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.tax.smart_promotion_fee_tax_amount | string | no |  | Sales tax for the Smart Promotion fee |
