| data.sku_transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown.tax.vat_amount | string | no |  | The VAT paid by the platform on the seller's behalf. Applicable only for cross-border shop orders. |
| data.sku_transactions[].product_name | string | no |  | The product title. |

_Only first 80 fields shown in Markdown; full fields are in JSON index._

### GET /finance/202501/statements/{statement_id}/statement_transactions

- Summary: GetTransactionsbyStatement
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Retrieves the details of a statement, including the transactions, which can be a standard order transaction, an adjustment transaction, or a reserve-related transaction. For the SKU-level details of an order transaction, refer to [Get Transactions by Order](650a6734defece02be67d724). Applicable for all regions' sellers. Only data after 2023-07-01 is available (Please note that for US cross-border sellers, data before 2025-04-30 is unavailable).
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Finance_202501_GetTransactionsbyStatement_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| statement_id | path | yes | string | The unique id of statement |
| page_token | query | no | string | An opaque token used to retrieve the next page of a paginated result set. Retrieve this value from the result of the `next_page_token` from a previous response. It is not needed for the first page. |
| sort_field | query | yes | string | The returned results will be sorted by the specified field. Only supports `order_create_time`. |
| sort_order | query | no | string | The sort order for the `sort_field` parameter. Default: ASC Possible values: - ASC: Ascending order - DESC: Descending order |
| page_size | query | no | object:int8 | The number of results to be returned per page. Default: 20 Valid range: [1-100] |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Finance_202501_GetTransactionsbyStatement_Response_Data | no | Finance_202501_GetTransactionsbyStatement_Response_Data |  |
| data.create_time | integer:int64 | no |  | The time when the statement was generated. Unix timestamp. Statements are generated daily at 00:00 UTC. |
| data.currency | string | no |  | The three-digit currency code in ISO 4217 format. |
| data.id | string | no |  | The statement ID. |
| data.next_page_token | string | no |  | An opaque token used to retrieve the next page of a paginated result set. Provide this value in the `page_token` parameter of your request if the current response does not return all the results. |
| data.payable_amount | string | no |  | The final amount paid out after accounting for reserve funds. Formula: total_settlement_amount + total_reserve_amount |
| data.status | string | no |  | The statement status. Only supports `SETTLED`. |
| data.total_count | integer:int32 | no |  | The number of transaction records in the statement. |
| data.total_reserve_amount | string | no |  | The total amount withheld from settlement based on TikTok Shop Reserve Policy. Refer to TikTok Shop Academy for more information. - A positive amount indicates the funds that have been released. - A negative amount indicates the funds being withheld from th... |
| data.total_settlement_amount | string | no |  | The total settlement amount. Formula: total_revenue_amount - total_shipping_cost_amount - total_fee_tax_amount - total_adjustment_amount |
| data.total_settlement_breakdown | Finance_202501_GetTransactionsbyStatement_Response_Data_TotalSettlementBreakdown | no | Finance_202501_GetTransactionsbyStatement_Response_Data_TotalSettlementBreakdown |  |
| data.total_settlement_breakdown.total_adjustment_amount | string | no |  | The total adjustment amount based on TikTok Shop policy. Refer to `transactions.type` for the list of adjustment-related policies. |
| data.total_settlement_breakdown.total_fee_tax_amount | string | no |  | The total fees and taxes charged by the platform at the time of order settlement. Shipping-related costs are excluded. |
| data.total_settlement_breakdown.total_revenue_amount | string | no |  | The total revenue amount at the time of order settlement. This is equivalent to the net sales amount. |
| data.total_settlement_breakdown.total_shipping_cost_amount | string | no |  | The total shipping costs at the time of order settlement. |
| data.transactions | array<Finance_202501_GetTransactionsbyStatement_Response_Data_Transactions> | no |  | The list of transaction records in the statement. Each transaction corresponds to an order, an adjustment, or a reserve-related transaction. |
| data.transactions[].adjustment_amount | string | no |  | The adjustment amount based on TikTok Shop policy. Refer to `transactions.type` for the list of adjustment-related policies. |
| data.transactions[].adjustment_id | string | no |  | The adjustment ID if the transaction is an adjustment. Each transaction can only be associated with an order ID or an adjustment ID. |
| data.transactions[].adjustment_order_id | string | no |  | The order ID associated with the adjustment, if any. |
| data.transactions[].associated_order_id | string | no |  | The order ID associated with the reserve transaction. |
| data.transactions[].estimated_release_time | string | no |  | The estimated date when the reserve funds will be released and paid out to the seller. Unix timestamp. Returns an empty value if the reserve funds have already been released. |
| data.transactions[].fee_tax_amount | string | no |  | The total fees and taxes charged by TikTok Shop at the time of order settlement. Shipping-related costs are excluded. This is equivalent to the sum of all contributory amounts in `fee_tax_breakdown`. |
| data.transactions[].fee_tax_breakdown | Finance_202501_GetTransactionsbyStatement_Response_Data_Transactions_FeeTaxBreakdown | no | Finance_202501_GetTransactionsbyStatement_Response_Data_Transactions_FeeTaxBreakdown |  |

### GET /finance/202507/orders/unsettled

- Summary: GetUnsettledTransactions
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: This API allows the partner to retrieve a list of unsettled transactions (incl. Orders & Adjustments) generated by a seller, returning the detailed fee breakdown for a list of order ID and adjustment ID. For now, this API only returns transactions which were created after 2025.01.01. Once one transaction is settled, which won't be returned by this API anymore, please get from Get Statement Transaction API. **Pay attention to that all data returned through this API is an estimated amount which subject to change before settlement and can only used for seller's reference, final settlement amou...

- Response schema: `Finance_202507_GetUnsettledTransactions_Response`

### POST /fulfillment/202309/files/upload

- Summary: FulfillmentUploadDeliveryFile
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: This API is used for the seller to upload the proof of delivery file for a package, and to generate the URL of the corresponding file. The generated URL is used for the [Update Package Delivery Status API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa332c16ffe02b8f0ba82?external_id=650aa332c16ffe02b8f0ba82). This API only supports uploading qualification files in `PDF` format. The file size can not exceed 10MB. Note: Only sellers utilizing the SOF (Seller Own Fleet) capability can use this API.
- Request schema: `Fulfillment_202309_FulfillmentUploadDeliveryFile_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Fulfillment_202309_FulfillmentUploadDeliveryFile_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: multipart/form-data |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| data | string:binary | no |  | PDF file data to be uploaded to TikTok Shop. Prerequisites： - Only `PDF` file format is supported. - Original file size must not exceed 10MB. |
| name | string | no |  | The name of the uploaded file. The file name must include the file type. |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Fulfillment_202309_FulfillmentUploadDeliveryFile_Response_Data | no | Fulfillment_202309_FulfillmentUploadDeliveryFile_Response_Data |  |
| data.name | string | no |  | The name of the file. |
| data.url | string | no |  | The URL returned from uploading the file that can be directly opened in a browser. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### POST /fulfillment/202309/images/upload

- Summary: FulfillmentUploadDeliveryImage
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: This API is used for the seller to upload the proof of delivery image for a package, and to generate the URL of the corresponding file. The generated URL is used in the [Update Package Delivery Status API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa332c16ffe02b8f0ba82?external_id=650aa332c16ffe02b8f0ba82) to indicate that the parcel has been delivered. Usage requirements: - The image format must be `JPEG`, `PNG`, or `JPG`. - The image size can not exceed 5MB.
- Request schema: `Fulfillment_202309_FulfillmentUploadDeliveryImage_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Fulfillment_202309_FulfillmentUploadDeliveryImage_Response`

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| data | Fulfillment_202309_FulfillmentUploadDeliveryImage_Response_Data | no | Fulfillment_202309_FulfillmentUploadDeliveryImage_Response_Data |  |
| data.height | integer:int32 | no |  | The image height returned from uploading the image. This height refers to the processed image height, not the original image height. Units: pixels. |
| data.url | string | no |  | The URL returned from uploading the image that can be directly opened in a browser. |
| data.width | integer:int32 | no |  | The image width returned from uploading the image. This width refers to the processed image width, not the original image width. Units: pixels. |

| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### GET /fulfillment/202309/orders/split_attributes

- Summary: GetOrderSplitAttributes
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Use this API to check whether an order(s) can be split into multiple packages or not.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Fulfillment_202309_GetOrderSplitAttributes_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| order_ids | query | yes | array<string> | Query list of TikTok Shop order IDs. |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Fulfillment_202309_GetOrderSplitAttributes_Response_Data | no | Fulfillment_202309_GetOrderSplitAttributes_Response_Data |  |
| data.split_attributes | array<Fulfillment_202309_GetOrderSplitAttributes_Response_Data_SplitAttributes> | no |  | Specific return information (can return multiple TikTok Shop order IDs). |
| data.split_attributes[].can_split | boolean | no |  | Whether an order can be split: - `true`: The order can be split into multiple packages. - `false`: The order cannot be split into multiple packages. |
| data.split_attributes[].must_split | boolean | no |  | Whether an order must be split: - true: The order must be split into multiple packages. - false: The order does not have to be split into multiple packages. |
| data.split_attributes[].must_split_reasons | array<Fulfillment_202309_GetOrderSplitAttributes_Response_Data_SplitAttributes_MustSplitReasons> | no |  | The reason why the order must be split. Only return this field when must_split = true. |
| data.split_attributes[].must_split_reasons[].category_id | string | no |  | If the value of reason.type is "CATEGORY_ITEM_LIMITATION", this field will return a value. If the value of reason.type is "TOTAL_COUNT_LIMITATION", this field will return no value |
| data.split_attributes[].must_split_reasons[].max_count | string | no |  | For category verification, return the maximum quantity of goods allowed for this category in a single package; for total product quantity verification within the package, return the total quantity limit of goods in a single package. |
| data.split_attributes[].must_split_reasons[].type | string | no |  | It will return which type of verification is hit. There are two types of verification: CATEGORY_ITEM_LIMITATION means category verification and TOTAL_COUNT_LIMITATION means total product quantity verification. |
| data.split_attributes[].order_id | string | no |  | TikTok Shop order ID. |
| data.split_attributes[].reason | string | no |  | The reason why the order cannot be split. Only return this field when `can_split = false`. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### GET /fulfillment/202309/orders/{order_id}/handover_time_slots

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| data.can_drop_off | boolean | no |  | Does this package support point delivery |
| data.can_pickup | boolean | no |  | Does this package support door-to-door collection |
| data.can_van_collection | boolean | no |  | Only for UK. Use this field to determine wheather van collection is available |

| data.pickup_slots | array<Fulfillment_202309_GetHandoverTimeslots_Response_Data_PickupSlots> | no |  | Package pickup time slots for door-to-door collection |

| data.pickup_slots[].end_time | integer:int64 | no |  | The end date and time of the package pickup time slot. |
| data.pickup_slots[].start_time | integer:int64 | no |  | The start date and time of the package pickup time slot. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### POST /fulfillment/202309/orders/{order_id}/packages

- Summary: MarkPackageAsShipped
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: **This API is currently exclusive to the following markets: US, UK, ES, IE, IT, DE, FR, JP.** This API is for sellers who fulfill orders through their own selected/preferred logistics carrier, and allows sellers to upload valid package information (items in packages, shipping provider information, and tracking number) orders/order line items to TikTok Shop. Use [Get Shipping Providers API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa48d4a0bb702c06d85cd?external_id=650aa48d4a0bb702c06d85cd) to retrieve the `shipping_provider_id` for shipping providers.
- Request schema: `Fulfillment_202309_MarkPackageAsShipped_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Fulfillment_202309_MarkPackageAsShipped_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| order_id | path | yes | string | The unique identifier for a TikTok Shop order. |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| order_line_item_ids | array<string> | no |  | List of order line item IDs. |
| order_line_item_ids[] | string | no |  |  |
| order_line_list | array<Fulfillment_202309_MarkPackageAsShipped_RequestBody_OrderLineList> | no |  | This new parameter is completely backward compatible with the previous oder_line_items_ids field and in addition this supports bundle order splitting, use the sub items accordingly |
| order_line_list[].order_line_id | string | no |  | The corresponding order line ID. |
| order_line_list[].sub_item_id | string | no |  | The sub-order-line ID inside a bundle product. - Required for bundle products. - Not required for non-bundle products. |
| shipping_provider_id | string | no |  | Use [Get Shipping Provider API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa48d4a0bb702c06d85cd?external_id=650aa48d4a0bb702c06d85cd) to retrieve the `shipping_provider_id` for shipping providers. |
| tracking_number | string | no |  | Tracking number. |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Fulfillment_202309_MarkPackageAsShipped_Response_Data | no | Fulfillment_202309_MarkPackageAsShipped_Response_Data |  |
| data.order_id | string | no |  | TikTok Shop order ID. |
| data.order_line_item_ids | array<string> | no |  | List of order line item IDs. |
| data.order_line_item_ids[] | string | no |  |  |
| data.package_id | string | no |  | Package ID. |
| data.warning | Fulfillment_202309_MarkPackageAsShipped_Response_Data_Warning | no | Fulfillment_202309_MarkPackageAsShipped_Response_Data_Warning |  |
| data.warning.message | string | no |  | Specific warning information. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### POST /fulfillment/202309/orders/{order_id}/shipping_services/query

- Summary: GetEligibleShippingService
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Use this API ( for US ) to query the list of available shipping services when specifying packages' size or weight. Use this API ( for JP ) to query the list of available shipping services when specifying packages' size or weight.The shipping fee and delivery time is an estimate only and is based on the package dimensions and weight you provided. Options listed may differ if you change the package attributes at the time of shipping.

- Response schema: `Fulfillment_202309_GetEligibleShippingService_Response`

### POST /fulfillment/202309/orders/{order_id}/split

- Summary: SplitOrders
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Use this API to confirm an order split. Note that ​​supported split levels vary by region​​: - Some regions support ​​item-level splits​​ (splitting individual units of the same SKU). - Others only support ​​all-units splits​​ (splitting different SKUs into separate packages). Here are two examples of supported splits: - ​​**Case 1**: all-units split​​, applicable for orders in BR, SEA, MX (local sellers) Split a buyer order of SKU A of quantity 2 and SKU B of quantity 1 into two separate packages: - ​​Package 1​​: all units of SKU A ​​ - Package 2​​: all units of SKU B - **​​Case 2**: item...
- Request schema: `Fulfillment_202309_SplitOrders_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Fulfillment_202309_SplitOrders_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| order_id | path | yes | string | TikTok Shop order ID. |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| splittable_groups | array<Fulfillment_202309_SplitOrders_RequestBody_SplittableGroups> | no |  | Input list of splittable groups. |
| splittable_groups[].id | string | no |  | A unique identifier designated by the developer. This identifier will represent a group of items that will be split into a new package. Once split is confirmed, the platform will be assigned a new package ID for this group of items. For example, if you inpu... |
| splittable_groups[].order_line_item_ids | array<string> | no |  | The order line item IDs that need to be split into this group. |
| splittable_groups[].order_line_item_ids[] | string | no |  |  |
| splittable_groups_v2 | array<Fulfillment_202309_SplitOrders_RequestBody_SplittableGroupsV2> | no |  | This new parameter is completely backward compatible with the previous splittable groups field and in addition this supports bundle order splitting, use the sub items accordingly |
| splittable_groups_v2[].id | string | no |  | A unique identifier designated by the developer. This identifier will represent a group of items that will be split into a new package. Once split is confirmed, the platform will be assigned a new package ID for this group of items. For example, if you inpu... |
| splittable_groups_v2[].order_line_list | array<Fulfillment_202309_SplitOrders_RequestBody_SplittableGroupsV2_OrderLineList> | no |  | This new parameter is completely backward compatible with the previous oder_line_items_ids field and in addition this supports bundle order splitting, use the sub items accordingly |
| splittable_groups_v2[].order_line_list[].order_line_id | string | no |  | The corresponding order line ID. |
| splittable_groups_v2[].order_line_list[].sub_item_id | string | no |  | The sub-order-line ID inside a bundle product. - Required for bundle products. - Not required for non-bundle products. |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Fulfillment_202309_SplitOrders_Response_Data | no | Fulfillment_202309_SplitOrders_Response_Data |  |
| data.packages | array<Fulfillment_202309_SplitOrders_Response_Data_Packages> | no |  | The number of packages returned is dependent on the number of `splittable_group_ids` you sent in the request. |
| data.packages[].id | string | no |  | Package ID after success split. Use this new package ID to call [Ship Package API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa4f1defece02be6e7cb1?external_id=650aa4f1defece02be6e7cb1) to ship the package. |
| data.packages[].splittable_group_id | string | no |  | The ID of split group in request body. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### POST /fulfillment/202309/packages

- Summary: CreatePackages
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Use this API to ship orders (purchase labels). This API is region specific to the US. The shipping fee and delivery time is an estimate only and is based on the package dimensions and weight you provided. Based on the package attributes, options listed below may differ from your shipping subscriptions.
- Request schema: `Fulfillment_202309_CreatePackages_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Fulfillment_202309_CreatePackages_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| dimension | Fulfillment_202309_CreatePackages_RequestBody_Dimension | no | Fulfillment_202309_CreatePackages_RequestBody_Dimension |  |
| dimension.height | string | no |  | Package height. The length, width, and height must be passed together. |
| dimension.length | string | no |  | Package length. The length, width, and height must be passed together. |
| dimension.unit | string | no |  | The unit of measurement for the package dimensions. Available values: - `CM` - `INCH` |
| dimension.width | string | no |  | Package width. The length, width, and height must be passed together. |

| order_line_list[].order_line_id | string | no |  | The corresponding order line ID. |
| order_line_list[].sub_item_id | string | no |  | The sub-order-line ID inside a bundle product. - Required for bundle products. - Not required for non-bundle products. |
| shipping_service_id | string | no |  | Specify the shipping service used. If not specified, use the default service obtained from [Get Eligible Shipping Service](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa6b2bace3e02b75dda4e). |
| weight | Fulfillment_202309_CreatePackages_RequestBody_Weight | no | Fulfillment_202309_CreatePackages_RequestBody_Weight |  |
| weight.unit | string | no |  | The unit of measurement for the package weight. Available values: - `GRAM` - `POUND` |

| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### POST /fulfillment/202309/packages/deliver

- Summary: UpdatePackageDeliveryStatus
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Use this API to update the delivery status of the package from in transit status. Please note that only sellers utilizing the SOF( Seller Own Fleet) capability can use this API to update the package status to 'DELIVERED'. This API is only available for the SEA region.
- Request schema: `Fulfillment_202309_UpdatePackageDeliveryStatus_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Fulfillment_202309_UpdatePackageDeliveryStatus_Response`

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| packages | array<Fulfillment_202309_UpdatePackageDeliveryStatus_RequestBody_Packages> | no |  | The return list of packages. |
| packages[].delivery_type | string | no |  | Delivery status of the package. Possible values: - `DELIVERY_SUCCESS`: Package has been successfully delivered. - `DELIVERY_FAILED`: Package delivery has been unsuccessful. - `UPDATE_POD`: For packages that have been delivered, but you would like to update ... |

Possible values: - `INVALID_ADDRESS`: The buyer shipping address is invalid. - `UNABLE_RECEIVE`: The buyer is cur... |
| packages[].file_type | string | no |  | Attachment type: - `IMG` - `PDF` |
| packages[].file_url | string | no |  | Attachment URL. The seller can use the [Upload Delivery File](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa6e04a0bb702c06dcd34?external_id=650aa6e04a0bb702c06dcd34#Back%20To%20Top) and [Upload Delivery Image](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650a... |
| packages[].id | string | no |  | The package ID. |

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| data | Fulfillment_202309_UpdatePackageDeliveryStatus_Response_Data | no | Fulfillment_202309_UpdatePackageDeliveryStatus_Response_Data |  |

### POST /fulfillment/202309/packages/schedule

- Summary: SchedulePackageHandover
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Use this API to schedule a platform shipping package pickup or drop off. After scheduling the package pickup or drop off, the API will return relevant package pickup/ drop off info. Note: Please use order id to schedule a package pickup or drop off.
- Request schema: `Fulfillment_202309_SchedulePackageHandover_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Fulfillment_202309_SchedulePackageHandover_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| handover_method | string | no |  | Schedule the package as a pickup or drop off. - PICKUP (A shipping provider will pickup the package(s) from the seller's pickup address) - DROP_OFF (Seller will need to drop off the package(s) to a designated location) |
| order_id | string | no |  | TikTok Shop order ID |
| order_line_item_ids | array<string> | no |  | Line item ID list |
| order_line_item_ids[] | string | no |  |  |
| pickup_slot | Fulfillment_202309_SchedulePackageHandover_RequestBody_PickupSlot | no | Fulfillment_202309_SchedulePackageHandover_RequestBody_PickupSlot |  |
| pickup_slot.end_time | integer:int64 | no |  | The end date and time of the package pickup time slot. |
| pickup_slot.start_time | integer:int64 | no |  | The start date and time of the package pickup time slot. |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Fulfillment_202309_SchedulePackageHandover_Response_Data | no | Fulfillment_202309_SchedulePackageHandover_Response_Data |  |
| data.create_time | integer:int64 | no |  | Unix timestamp |
| data.dimension | Fulfillment_202309_SchedulePackageHandover_Response_Data_Dimension | no | Fulfillment_202309_SchedulePackageHandover_Response_Data_Dimension |  |
| data.dimension.height | string | no |  | The height of package. |
| data.dimension.length | string | no |  | The length of package. |
| data.dimension.unit | string | no |  | The unit of measurement is used to measure the length. - CM - INCH |
| data.dimension.width | string | no |  | The width of package. |
| data.handover_method | string | no |  | Schedule the package as a pickup or drop off. - PICKUP (A shipping provider will pickup the package(s) from the seller's pickup address) - DROP_OFF (Seller will need to drop off the package(s) to a designated location) |
| data.order_id | string | no |  | TikTok Shop order ID |
| data.order_line_item_ids | array<string> | no |  | Order line item IDs that belong to the package. |
| data.order_line_item_ids[] | string | no |  |  |
| data.package_id | string | no |  | Package ID. |
| data.shipping_provider_id | string | no |  | Package shipping provider id |
| data.shipping_provider_name | string | no |  | Package shipping provider |
| data.tracking_number | string | no |  | Package tracking number |
| data.update_time | integer:int64 | no |  | Unix timestamp |
| data.weight | Fulfillment_202309_SchedulePackageHandover_Response_Data_Weight | no | Fulfillment_202309_SchedulePackageHandover_Response_Data_Weight |  |
| data.weight.unit | string | no |  | The unit of measurement is used to measure the weight. - GRAM - POUND |
| data.weight.value | string | no |  | The value of the weight of the scheduled package. |

| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### POST /fulfillment/202309/packages/search

- Summary: SearchPackage
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Retrieve package IDs based on specified conditions. Package creation time and information update time are the common querying conditions.
- Request schema: `Fulfillment_202309_SearchPackage_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Fulfillment_202309_SearchPackage_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| page_size | query | yes | integer:int32 | The number of results to be returned per page. Valid range: [1-50]. |
| sort_field | query | no | string | The returned results will be sorted by the specified field. Default: `create_time` Possible values: - `create_time` - `update_time` - `order_pay_time` Specify the order for sorting the returned results by using the sort_order parameter. |
| sort_order | query | no | string | The sort order for the sort_field parameter. Default: `DESC` Possible values: - `ASC`: Ascending order - `DESC`: Descending order |
| page_token | query | no | string | An opaque token used to retrieve the next page of a paginated result set. Retrieve this value from the result of the `next_page_token` from a previous response. It is not needed for the first page. |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string | Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/pa... |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| create_time_ge | integer:int64 | no |  | Filter the packages to show only those that are created after (or at) the specified date and time. Unix timestamp. |
| create_time_lt | integer:int64 | no |  | Filter the packages to show only those that are created before the specified date and time. Unix timestamp. |
| package_status | string | no |  | Possible values: - `PROCESSING`: Package has been arranged by seller. Waiting for carrier to collect the parcel. - `FULFILLING`: Package has been collected by carrier and in transit. - `COMPLETED`: Package has been delivered. - `CANCELLED`: Package has been... |
| update_time_ge | integer:int64 | no |  | Filter the packages to show only those that are updated after (or at) the specified date and time. Unix timestamp. |
| update_time_lt | integer:int64 | no |  | Filter the packages to show only those that are updated before the specified date and time. Unix timestamp. |

Waiting for carrier to collect the parcel. - `FULFILLING`: Package has been collected by carrier and in transit. - `COMPLETED`: Package has been delivered. - `CANCELLED`: Package has been... |
| data.packages[].tracking_number | string | no |  | Package tracking number. |
| data.packages[].update_time | integer:int64 | no |  | Package latest update time. Unix timestamp |

### POST /fulfillment/202309/packages/ship

- Summary: BatchShipPackages
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Use this API to batch ship packages by providing multiple package IDs. This API is available for TikTok shipping orders as well as seller shipping orders. - `TikTok Shipping`: Schedule a package handover time for TikTok Shipping carriers to pickup a package from the Seller. - `Seller Shipping`: Seller arranges their own shipping, and upload a `tracking_number` and `shipping_provider_id`. Package ID can be obtained from [Get Order Detail](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa8ccc16ffe02b8f167a0?external_id=650aa8ccc16ffe02b8f167a0).
- Request schema: `Fulfillment_202309_BatchShipPackages_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Fulfillment_202309_BatchShipPackages_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| packages | array<Fulfillment_202309_BatchShipPackages_RequestBody_Packages> | no |  | Input list of packages you would like to batch ship. |
| packages[].handover_method | string | no |  | Possible values: - `PICKUP`: A shipping provider will pickup the package(s) from the seller's pickup address. - `DROP_OFF`: The seller will need to drop off the package(s) at a designated location. |
| packages[].id | string | no |  | Package ID. |
| packages[].pickup_slot | Fulfillment_202309_BatchShipPackages_RequestBody_Packages_PickupSlot | no | Fulfillment_202309_BatchShipPackages_RequestBody_Packages_PickupSlot |  |
| packages[].pickup_slot.end_time | integer:int64 | no |  | The end date and time of the package pickup time slot. Unix timestamp. |
| packages[].pickup_slot.start_time | integer:int64 | no |  | The start date and time of the package pickup time slot. Unix timestamp. |
| packages[].self_shipment | Fulfillment_202309_BatchShipPackages_RequestBody_Packages_SelfShipment | no | Fulfillment_202309_BatchShipPackages_RequestBody_Packages_SelfShipment |  |
| packages[].self_shipment.shipping_provider_id | string | no |  | For packages with the `SEND_BY_SELLER` delivery option type (seller shipping), you must provide the shipping provider information. Please use the [Get Shipping Providers](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa48d4a0bb702c06d85cd?external_id=650aa48... |
| packages[].self_shipment.tracking_number | string | no |  | For packages with the `SEND_BY_SELLER` delivery option type (seller shipping), you must provide the package's tracking number. |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Fulfillment_202309_BatchShipPackages_Response_Data | no | Fulfillment_202309_BatchShipPackages_Response_Data |  |
| data.errors | array<Fulfillment_202309_BatchShipPackages_Response_Data_Errors> | no |  | Return list of possible errors during package batch shipment attempt. |
| data.errors[].code | integer:int64 | no |  | The failure reason code. |
| data.errors[].detail | Fulfillment_202309_BatchShipPackages_Response_Data_Errors_Detail | no | Fulfillment_202309_BatchShipPackages_Response_Data_Errors_Detail |  |
| data.errors[].detail.package_id | string | no |  | Package ID. |
| data.errors[].message | string | no |  | The failure reason message. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### GET /fulfillment/202309/packages/{package_id}

- Summary: GetPackageDetail
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Returns information about a package, including handover time slot, tracking number, and shipping provider information.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Fulfillment_202309_GetPackageDetail_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| package_id | path | yes | string | TikTok Shop package ID. |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Fulfillment_202309_GetPackageDetail_Response_Data | no | Fulfillment_202309_GetPackageDetail_Response_Data |  |
| data.biz_extension_tags | array<string> | no |  | Special tags for current package if any. - `NON_MCF`: whether this package was shipped as a MCF order while in fact it is not. |
| data.biz_extension_tags[] | string | no |  |  |
| data.create_time | integer:int64 | no |  | Package creation time. Unix timestamp. |
| data.delivery_option_id | string | no |  | Order delivery option ID. Delivery option ID is mapped to seller configured logistics templates ID. |
| data.delivery_option_name | string | no |  | Delivery option name. For display purposes only. |

| data.dimension.height | string | no |  | The height of the scheduled package. |
| data.dimension.length | string | no |  | The length of the scheduled package. |
| data.dimension.unit | string | no |  | The unit of measurement used to measure the length. Possible values: - `CM` - `INCH` |
| data.dimension.width | string | no |  | The width of the scheduled package. |
| data.handover_method | string | no |  | Whether the package is delivered by pick up or drop off. Possible values: - `PICKUP`: A Logistics carrier will pickup the package(s) from the seller's pickup address. - `DROP_OFF`: Seller will need to drop off the package(s) to a designated location. |
| data.has_multi_skus | boolean | no |  | Whether there are multiple SKU IDs in a package. |
| data.insurance | Fulfillment_202309_GetPackageDetail_Response_Data_Insurance | no | Fulfillment_202309_GetPackageDetail_Response_Data_Insurance |  |
| data.insurance.claim_status | string | no |  | The insurance claim status. Available values: - `NOT_STARTED`: Claim has not been initiated for this package. - `CLAIM_PENDING`: Claim is currently under review. - `APPROVED`: Claim has been approved. - `DECLINED`: Claim has been declined. |
| data.insurance.coverage_amount | string | no |  | The insurance coverage amount for the package. Units: USD. |
| data.insurance.is_claim_eligible | boolean | no |  | Whether the order is eligible for an insurance claim, based on eligible refund reasons. |
| data.insurance.is_purchased | boolean | no |  | Whether insurance has been purchased for the package. |

| data.note_tag | string | no |  | Possible values: - `BUYER_UNNOTED`: The order has not been noted by buyer. - `BUYER_NOTED`: The order has been noted by buyer. |
| data.order_line_item_ids | array<string> | no |  | The order line item ID contained in the package. |
| data.order_line_item_ids[] | string | no |  |  |
| data.orders | array<Fulfillment_202309_GetPackageDetail_Response_Data_Orders> | no |  | The response list of TikTok Shop orders. |

| data.orders[].skus[].quantity | integer:int64 | no |  | [Deprecated]SKU quantity. |
| data.package_id | string | no |  | TikTok Shop package ID. |
| data.package_status | string | no |  | Possible values: - `TO FULFILL`：Waiting for the merchant or warehouse to ship the package. - `PROCESSING`: Package has been arranged by seller. Waiting for carrier to collect the parcel. - `FULFILLING`: Package has been collected by carrier and in transit. ... |
| data.package_sub_status | string | no |  | -ISSUE：Package allocation failed, need to contact the platform. -CREATED：Package has been created -STOCKING：Platform verification completed, waiting for the merchant to ship -RTSING：Purchasing shipping label and waiting for the carrier to return results. -R... |
| data.pickup_slot | Fulfillment_202309_GetPackageDetail_Response_Data_PickupSlot | no | Fulfillment_202309_GetPackageDetail_Response_Data_PickupSlot |  |

| data.pickup_slot.start_time | integer:int64 | no |  | Start of the time slot when a package is scheduled to be picked up by carrier. Unix timestamp. |

| data.recipient_address.address_detail | string | no |  | Full buyer detail address. |
| data.recipient_address.address_line1 | string | no |  | The first line of the street address |
| data.recipient_address.address_line2 | string | no |  | The second line of the street address. |
| data.recipient_address.address_line3 | string | no |  | The third line of the street address. Usually only for the Brazilian market. |
| data.recipient_address.address_line4 | string | no |  | The fourth line of the street address. Usually only for the Brazilian market. |
| data.recipient_address.full_address | string | no |  | The complete recipient addresses information. |
| data.recipient_address.name | string | no |  | The name of the recipient. Please note, if this order uses platform logistics, recipient name will be desensitized |
| data.recipient_address.phone_number | string | no |  | The telephone number of the buyer. Please note, if this order use platform logistics, phone number will be desensitized. |
| data.recipient_address.postal_code | string | no |  | The postal code that can be used by seller for shipping (in the U.S, this refers to the ZIP code). |
| data.recipient_address.region_code | string | no |  | Region code. |
| data.sender_address | Fulfillment_202309_GetPackageDetail_Response_Data_SenderAddress | no | Fulfillment_202309_GetPackageDetail_Response_Data_SenderAddress |  |
| data.sender_address.address_detail | string | no |  | Full sender detail address. |
| data.sender_address.address_line1 | string | no |  | The first line of the sender's street address. |
| data.sender_address.address_line2 | string | no |  | The second line of the sender's street address. |
| data.sender_address.address_line3 | string | no |  | The third line of the sender's street address. Usually only for the Brazilian market. |
| data.sender_address.address_line4 | string | no |  | The fourth line of the sender's street address. Usually only for the Brazilian market. |
| data.sender_address.full_address | string | no |  | The complete sender addresses information. |
| data.sender_address.name | string | no |  | The name of the sender. |
| data.sender_address.phone_number | string | no |  | The telephone number of the sender. |
| data.sender_address.postal_code | string | no |  | The postal code of the sender. |
| data.sender_address.region_code | string | no |  | Region code of the sender. |
| data.ship_exception_reason | string | no |  | -PACKAGE_DAMAGAED -PACKAGE_LOST -RETURNED_TO_SHIPPER -PACKAGE_SCRAP |
| data.shipping_provider_id | string | no |  | Package shipping provider ID. |
| data.shipping_provider_name | string | no |  | Package shipping provider name. |
| data.shipping_type | string | no |  | The method of delivery. Possible values: - `TIKTOK`: Shipping service provided by TikTok. The seller should obtain a shipping label from TikTok. - `SELLER`: Seller provides shipping, including through 3rd party fulfillment providers on behalf of the seller. |
| data.split_and_combine_tag | string | no |  | Possible values: - `DEFAULT`: The package has not undergone any combine or split operation. - `COMBINE`: The package has been consolidated with another order. - `SPLIT`: The order has been split into multiple orders. |
| data.tracking_number | string | no |  | Package tracking number. |
| data.update_time | integer:int64 | no |  | The time the package has been updated. Unix timestamp. |
| data.weight | Fulfillment_202309_GetPackageDetail_Response_Data_Weight | no | Fulfillment_202309_GetPackageDetail_Response_Data_Weight |  |
| data.weight.unit | string | no |  | The unit of measurement used to measure the weight. Possible values: - `GRAM` - `POUND` |
| data.weight.value | string | no |  | The value of the weight of the scheduled package. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### GET /fulfillment/202309/packages/{package_id}/handover_time_slots

- Summary: GetPackageHandoverTimeSlots
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Use this API to retrieve the time slots available for pickup, drop-off, or van collection for the seller's specified package by using package ID.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Fulfillment_202309_GetPackageHandoverTimeSlots_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| package_id | path | yes | string | TikTok Shop package ID. |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Fulfillment_202309_GetPackageHandoverTimeSlots_Response_Data | no | Fulfillment_202309_GetPackageHandoverTimeSlots_Response_Data |  |
| data.can_drop_off | boolean | no |  | Whether this package be dropped off at a drop-off location |
| data.can_pickup | boolean | no |  | Whether this package supports door-to-door collection. |
| data.can_van_collection | boolean | no |  | Specific to UK. Use this field to determine whether van collection is available. |
| data.drop_off_point_url | string | no |  | View package drop-off locations via provided URL. |
| data.pickup_slots | array<Fulfillment_202309_GetPackageHandoverTimeSlots_Response_Data_PickupSlots> | no |  | Time slot for door-to-door collection. |
| data.pickup_slots[].avaliable | boolean | no |  | Whether an appointment be made for this time slot. |
| data.pickup_slots[].end_time | integer:int64 | no |  | The end date and time of the package pick up time slot. Unix timestamp. |
| data.pickup_slots[].start_time | integer:int64 | no |  | The start date and time of the package pick up time slot. Unix timestamp. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### POST /fulfillment/202309/packages/{package_id}/ship

- Summary: ShipPackage
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Use this API to ship a package. There are two kinds of shipping options available: `TikTok Shipping` or `Seller Shipping`. - `TikTok Shipping`: Schedule a package handover time for TikTok Shipping carriers to pickup a package from seller. - `Seller Shipping`: Seller arranges their own shipping, and uploads a tracking number and `shipping_provider_id`. Package ID can be obtained from [Get Order Detail](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa8ccc16ffe02b8f167a0?external_id=650aa8ccc16ffe02b8f167a0#Back%20To%20Top).
- Request schema: `Fulfillment_202309_ShipPackage_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Fulfillment_202309_ShipPackage_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| package_id | path | yes | string | TikTok Shop package ID. |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| handover_method | string | no |  | Possible values: - `PICKUP`: A logistics carrier will pick up the package(s) from the seller's pickup address. - `DROP_OFF`: The seller will need to drop off the package(s) to a designated location. |
| pickup_slot | Fulfillment_202309_ShipPackage_RequestBody_PickupSlot | no | Fulfillment_202309_ShipPackage_RequestBody_PickupSlot |  |
| pickup_slot.end_time | integer:int64 | no |  | The end date and time of the package pickup time slot. Unix timestamp. |
| pickup_slot.start_time | integer:int64 | no |  | The start date and time of the package pickup time slot. Unix timestamp. |
| self_shipment | Fulfillment_202309_ShipPackage_RequestBody_SelfShipment | no | Fulfillment_202309_ShipPackage_RequestBody_SelfShipment |  |
| self_shipment.shipping_provider_id | string | no |  | For package with `SEND_BY_SELLER` as `delivery_option` (merchant self-shipping mode), you must input a `shipping_provider_id` to call this API. Please use [Get Shipping Providers](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa48d4a0bb702c06d85cd?external_i... |
| self_shipment.tracking_number | string | no |  | For package with `SEND_BY_SELLER` as `delivery_option` (merchant self-shipping mode), you must input a `tracking_number` to call this API. |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | object | no |  |  |
| data | object | no |  |  |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### GET /fulfillment/202309/packages/{package_id}/shipping_documents

- Summary: GetPackageShippingDocument
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: For orders shipped by TikTok Shop, this API retrieves the URL of shipping documents (shipping label and packing slip) for a package specified by the package ID. This API is only applicable to "TikTok Shipping" orders. To obtain the shipping documents URL via this API, first call "Ship Package" to ship the corresponding package.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Fulfillment_202309_GetPackageShippingDocument_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| package_id | path | yes | string | TikTok Shop package ID. |
| document_type | query | yes | string | Available document types: - `SHIPPING_LABEL`: Returns the shipping label in PDF format by default. - `PACKING_SLIP`: Returns the packing slip in PDF format by default. - `SHIPPING_LABEL_AND_PACKING_SLIP`: Returns both the shipping label and the packing slip... |
| document_size | query | no | string | Use this field to specify the size of the document to obtain. This parameter is only applicable to shipping labels, picking slips, and packing slips that are in the PDF format. It is not applicable for hazmat labels as these are fixed to A4. If you specify ... |
| document_format | query | no | string | The format of the shipping document. Possible values: - PDF (Default) - ZPL (Only for BR and MX market) **Note**: Not applicable for `SHIPPING_LABEL_PICTURE` document type. |
| shipping_period | query | no | string | Obtain shipping labels from designated last-mile delivery providers for cross-border scenarios. Possible values: - DEFAULT (Default) - LAST_MILE (Only cross-border services under the 4PL model with the business solution of 3PL for main transport & customs c... |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Fulfillment_202309_GetPackageShippingDocument_Response_Data | no | Fulfillment_202309_GetPackageShippingDocument_Response_Data |  |
| data.doc_url | string | no |  | The URL of the shipping label and packing slip generated for the specified package. The URL is valid for 24 hours. |
| data.tracking_number | string | no |  | The package tracking number from the shipping carrier. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### POST /fulfillment/202309/packages/{package_id}/shipping_info/update

- Summary: UpdatePackageShippingInfo
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: If the seller entered an incorrect tracking number, this API allows the seller to update the tracking number and shipping provider for a package that has already been shipped. Attention: This API is only applicable to orders (or packages) shipped by the seller. It is only used to update the tracking number and shipping provider for packages that have already been shipped.

### POST /fulfillment/202407/bundles

- Summary: CreateFirstMileBundle
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: If you send multiple packages to TikTok Shop warehouse in a single first-mile bundle, you can use the API to create a first-mile bundle on TikTok Shop and get the bundle ID.
- Request schema: `Fulfillment_202407_CreateFirstMileBundle_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Fulfillment_202407_CreateFirstMileBundle_Response`

| name | in | required | type | description |

| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

| field | type | required | schema | description |

| order_ids | array<string> | no |  | The IDs of all the orders sent in a single first-mile bundle. The orders must follow the restrictions: - Each of the orders must exist and be RTS and shipping label printed. - The orders are sent by the same seller. - The orders belong to a single group of ... |
| order_ids[] | string | no |  |  |
| phone_tail_number | string | no |  | Last 4 digits of the sender's phone number. Required when `handover_method == DROP_OFF`. |
| shipping_provider_id | string | no |  | The logistic provider ID in TikTok Shop. Required when `handover_method == DROP_OFF`. |
| tracking_number | string | no |  | The logistic tracking number of the bundle. Required when `handover_method == DROP_OFF`. |

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| last_mile_bundle.weight.unit | string | no |  | Unit. Possible enumerations: - `gram`. |

| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

_None._

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |

| data.is_tiktok_collection | boolean | no |  | A flag to determine whether the package is TikTok Collections |
| data.is_tiktok_shipping | boolean | no |  | A flag to determine whether the package is TikTok Shipping |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

## fulfillment_v202512

### POST /fulfillment/202512/packages

- Summary: CreatePackages
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Use this API to ship orders (purchase labels). This API is region specific to the US and JP. The shipping fee and delivery time is an estimate only and is based on the package dimensions and weight you provided. Based on the package attributes, options listed below may differ from your shipping subscriptions.
- Request schema: `Fulfillment_202512_CreatePackages_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Fulfillment_202512_CreatePackages_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| dimension | Fulfillment_202512_CreatePackages_RequestBody_Dimension | no | Fulfillment_202512_CreatePackages_RequestBody_Dimension |  |
| dimension.height | string | no |  | Package height. The length, width, and height must be passed together. |
| dimension.length | string | no |  | Package length. The length, width, and height must be passed together. |
| dimension.unit | string | no |  | The unit of measurement for the package dimensions. Available values: - `CM` - `INCH` |
| dimension.width | string | no |  | Package width. The length, width, and height must be passed together. |
| order_id | string | no |  | TikTok Shop order ID. If ship_type=0&1,This is a required field;If ship_type=2,we will not use |
| order_line_item | array<Fulfillment_202512_CreatePackages_RequestBody_OrderLineItem> | no |  | List of order line item IDs. If ship_type=2,This is a required field;If ship_type=1&3,we will not use this field |
| order_line_item[].order_line_id | string | no |  | List of order line item IDs. If ship_type=2,This is a required field;If ship_type=1&3,we will not use this field |
| order_line_item[].sub_item_id | string | no |  | Only for virtual bundle items,list of sub item ids. If ship_type=2,This is a required field;If ship_type=1&3,we will not use this field |
| order_list_ids | array<string> | no |  | List of order line item IDs. If ship_type=3,This is a required field;If ship_type=1&2,we will not use this field |
| order_list_ids[] | string | no |  |  |
| ship_type | string | no |  | 1:All the products in one order are shipped in one package with one tracking number 2:Partical products in one parent order are shipped in multiple packages with multiple tracking numbers 3:All the products in multiple orders are shipped in one package with... |
| shipping_service_id | string | no |  | Specify the shipping service used. If not specified, use the default service obtained from [Get Eligible Shipping Service](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650aa6b2bace3e02b75dda4e). |
| weight | Fulfillment_202512_CreatePackages_RequestBody_Weight | no | Fulfillment_202512_CreatePackages_RequestBody_Weight |  |
| weight.unit | string | no |  | The unit of measurement for the package weight. Available values: - `GRAM` - `POUND` |
| weight.value | string | no |  | The numerical value of the package weight. |

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Fulfillment_202512_CreatePackages_Response_Data | no | Fulfillment_202512_CreatePackages_Response_Data |  |
| data.create_time | integer:int64 | no |  | The time when the product was created. Unix timestamp. |
| data.dimension | Fulfillment_202512_CreatePackages_Response_Data_Dimension | no | Fulfillment_202512_CreatePackages_Response_Data_Dimension |  |

- Summary: RedeemInfoCallback

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| order_info_list[].redeem_info.redeem_data | string | no |  | Set the redeem data to this field with the maximum number of characters 1200. The example of each type is shown below, CODE: abc12344 URL: https://{your_domain}/abc CODE_PIN(json format): {"type": "CODE_PIN","code": "12345","pin": "abc"} |
| order_info_list[].redeem_info.redeem_instruction_info | string | no |  | Additional redemption instruction in JSON format. Use instruction_url to specify a third-party website where the buyer completes redemption. This URL is included as a clickable link in the fulfillment email. Example: {"instruction_url": "https://example.com... |
| order_info_list[].redeem_info.redeem_type | string | no |  | What redeem type that you callback. 'CODE' - type code 'URL' - type url 'CODE_PIN' - type pin and code |
| order_info_list[].source_unique_id | string | no |  | Optional, a unique id related to the order line in the caller system |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Fulfillment_202601_RedeemInfoCallback_Response_Data | no | Fulfillment_202601_RedeemInfoCallback_Response_Data |  |
| data.order_statuses | array<Fulfillment_202601_RedeemInfoCallback_Response_Data_OrderStatuses> | no |  | Callback result.For partial failure usage, if some of order line id in the request fail, it will be recorded with a none zero status_code. |
| data.order_statuses[].order_line_id | string | no |  | Line order id, same as the input line order id. |
| data.order_statuses[].status_code | integer:int32 | no |  | Callback status of this line order id. A none zero code represent a failure callback. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### GET /logistics/202604/orders/{order_id}/tracking

- Summary: GetLogisticsTracking
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: This API can use the order number to obtain the corresponding logistics tracking information. This API can obtain more comprehensive logistics tracking information, which is more detailed than the Get tracking API.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Logistics_202604_GetLogisticsTracking_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| order_id | path | yes | string | TikTok Shop order ID. |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Logistics_202604_GetLogisticsTracking_Response_Data | no | Logistics_202604_GetLogisticsTracking_Response_Data |  |
| data.logistics_details | array<Logistics_202604_GetLogisticsTracking_Response_Data_LogisticsDetails> | no |  | A list of logistics details. One order may contain multiple parcels. |
| data.logistics_details[].carrier_name | string | no |  | The carrier name. |
| data.logistics_details[].newest_tracking_no | string | no |  | The latest logistics tracking number for this parcel. |
| data.logistics_details[].track_list | array<Logistics_202604_GetLogisticsTracking_Response_Data_LogisticsDetails_TrackList> | no |  | A list of logistics tracking events for this parcel. |
| data.logistics_details[].track_list[].action_code | integer:int32 | no |  | Action code of this tracking event. It is an enumerated status value; the full enumeration list is maintained by the business side. |
| data.logistics_details[].track_list[].action_code_name | string | no |  | Human-readable name of the action_code. It is an enumerated status value; the full enumeration list is maintained by the business side. |
| data.logistics_details[].track_list[].description | string | no |  | Description of this tracking event. |
| data.logistics_details[].track_list[].tracking_no | string | no |  | The logistics tracking number associated with this tracking event. |
| data.logistics_details[].track_list[].update_time_millis | integer:int64 | no |  | Unix timestamp in milliseconds (GMT/UTC+00:00) when this tracking event was updated. |
| data.order_id | string | no |  | TikTok Shop order ID. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### POST /order/202309/orders/search

- Summary: GetOrderList
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Returns a list of orders created or updated during the timeframe indicated by the specified parameters. You can also apply a range of filtering criteria to narrow the list of orders returned, such as order status, delivery option type, and buyer user ID.
- Request schema: `Order_202309_GetOrderList_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Order_202309_GetOrderList_Response`

## order_v202407

| method | path | summary |
| --- | --- | --- |
| GET | `/order/202407/orders/{order_id}/price_detail` | GetPriceDetail |

### GET /order/202407/orders/{order_id}/price_detail

- Summary: GetPriceDetail
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Get the detailed pricing calculation information of an order or a line item, including vouchers, tax, etc.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Order_202407_GetPriceDetail_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| order_id | path | yes | string | Order ID |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Order_202407_GetPriceDetail_Response_Data | no | Order_202407_GetPriceDetail_Response_Data |  |
| data.cod_fee | string | no |  | COD fee charged by shipping aggregators. For regions outside of Saudi Arabia, the value is `0.00`. |
| data.cod_fee_net_amount | string | no |  | COD fee charged by shipping aggregators including tax. For regions outside of Saudi Arabia, the value is `0.00`. |
| data.currency | string | no |  | Currency Type. Three-letter code, see [ISO 4217](https://www.iso.org/iso-4217-currency-codes.html). |
| data.distance_fee | string | no |  | Total distance fee for Horizon+ Program. Only applicable for ID market |
| data.distance_shipping_fee | string | no |  | Distance shipping fee is fee that charged charged by our logistics partner and covers the separate distance-based cost for deliveries outside Java island as a part of Horizon+ Program. Only applicable in ID Market. |

| data.line_items[].cod_fee_amount | string | no |  | COD fee charged by shipping aggregators including tax. For regions outside of Saudi Arabia, the value is `0.00`. |
| data.line_items[].currency | string | no |  | Currency Type. Three-letter code, see [ISO 4217](https://www.iso.org/iso-4217-currency-codes.html). |
| data.line_items[].distance_fee | string | no |  | Total distance fee for Horizon+ Program. Only applicable for ID market |
| data.line_items[].distance_shipping_fee | string | no |  | Distance shipping fee is fee that charged charged by our logistics partner and covers the separate distance-based cost for deliveries outside Java island as a part of Horizon+ Program. Only applicable in ID Market. |
| data.line_items[].id | string | no |  | corresponding line_item id |
| data.line_items[].net_price_amount | string | no |  | Price after tax |
| data.line_items[].payment | string | no |  | Payment of the order from the buyer. Calculation: `sku_sale_price` + `shipping_sale_price` + `tax_amount` + `small_order_fee` |
| data.line_items[].shipping_fee_deduction_platform | string | no |  | Shipping discount covered by the platform |
| data.line_items[].shipping_fee_deduction_platform_voucher | string | no |  | Shipping discount covered by the platform voucher `1010000`: PLATFORM_NEW_USER `1020000`: SELLER_SKU_PRICE `1030000`: PLATFORM_FREE_SHIPPING |
| data.line_items[].shipping_fee_deduction_seller | string | no |  | Shipping discount covered by the seller. |
| data.line_items[].shipping_list_price | string | no |  | Original shipping price |
| data.line_items[].shipping_sale_price | string | no |  | Promotional shipping price Calculation: shipping_list_price - shipping_fee_deduction -shipping_fee_deduction_platform |
| data.line_items[].sku_gift_net_price | string | no |  | Original sku list price of the gift product from the seller including tax. |
| data.line_items[].sku_gift_original_price | string | no |  | Original sku list price of the gift product from the seller. |
| data.line_items[].sku_list_price | string | no |  | Total MSRP price of the products. |
| data.line_items[].sku_sale_price | string | no |  | Total promotional sale price of the products. Calculation: `sku_list_price` - `subtotal_deduction_seller` - `subtotal_deduction_platform` |
| data.line_items[].subtotal | string | no |  | Total promotional sale price of the products including tax. Calculation: `sku_sale_price` + `subtotal_tax_amount` |
| data.line_items[].subtotal_deduction_platform | string | no |  | Platform provided price discount on the product |
| data.line_items[].subtotal_deduction_seller | string | no |  | Seller provided price discount on the product |
| data.line_items[].subtotal_tax_amount | string | no |  | Total tax amount on the product |
| data.line_items[].tax_amount | string | no |  | Total tax amount. Calculation: subtotal_tax_amount + shipping_fee_tax（in TaxDetail） + cod_fee_tax（TaxDetail） |
| data.line_items[].tax_rate | string | no |  | Tax rate |
| data.line_items[].total | string | no |  | Total number of the original price of the order. Calculation: `sku_list_price` + `shipping_list_price` |
| data.line_items[].voucher_deduction_platform | string | no |  | Type of the platform-providing discount on the product. Possible values: `1010000`: PLATFORM_NEW_USER, `1020000`: SELLER_SKU_PRICE, `1030000`: PLATFORM_FREE_SHIPPING |

| data.net_price_amount | string | no |  | Price after tax |
| data.payment | string | no |  | Payment of the order from the buyer. Calculation: `sku_sale_price` + `shipping_sale_price` + `tax_amount` + `small_order_fee` |
| data.shipping_fee_deduction_platform | string | no |  | Shipping discount covered by the platform |
| data.shipping_fee_deduction_platform_voucher | string | no |  | Shipping discount covered by the platform voucher: `1010000`: PLATFORM_NEW_USER, `1020000`: SELLER_SKU_PRICE `1030000`: PLATFORM_FREE_SHIPPING |
| data.shipping_fee_deduction_seller | string | no |  | Shipping discount covered by the seller. |
| data.shipping_list_price | string | no |  | Original shipping price |
| data.shipping_sale_price | string | no |  | Promotional shipping price Calculation: shipping_list_price - shipping_fee_deduction -shipping_fee_deduction_platform |
| data.sku_gift_net_price | string | no |  | Original sku list price of the gift product from the seller including tax. |
| data.sku_gift_original_price | string | no |  | Original sku list price of the gift product from the seller. |
| data.sku_list_price | string | no |  | Total MSRP price of the products. |
| data.sku_sale_price | string | no |  | Total promotional sale price of the products. Calculation: `sku_list_price` - `subtotal_deduction_seller` - `subtotal_deduction_platform` |
| data.subtotal | string | no |  | Total promotional sale price of the products including tax. Calculation: `sku_sale_price` + `subtotal_tax_amount` |
| data.subtotal_deduction_platform | string | no |  | Platform provided price discount on the product |
| data.subtotal_deduction_seller | string | no |  | Seller provided price discount on the product |
| data.subtotal_tax_amount | string | no |  | Total tax amount on the product |
| data.tax_amount | string | no |  | Total tax amount. Calculation: subtotal_tax_amount + shipping_fee_tax（in TaxDetail） + cod_fee_tax（TaxDetail） |
| data.tax_rate | string | no |  | Tax rate |
| data.total | string | no |  | Total number of the original price of the order. Calculation: `sku_list_price` + `shipping_list_price` |
| data.voucher_deduction_platform | string | no |  | Type of the platform-providing discount on the product. Possible values: `1010000`: PLATFORM_NEW_USER, `1020000`: SELLER_SKU_PRICE`, `1030000`: PLATFORM_FREE_SHIPPING |
| data.voucher_deduction_seller | string | no |  | Type of the seller-providing discount on the product. Possible values: `1010000`: PLATFORM_NEW_USER, `1020000`: SELLER_SKU_PRICE, `1030000`: PLATFORM_FREE_SHIPPING` |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

- Summary: GetOrderDetail

## order_v202511

| method | path | summary |
| --- | --- | --- |
| POST | `/order/202511/orders/blind_box_result/callback` | UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResults |

### POST /order/202511/orders/blind_box_result/callback

- Summary: UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResults
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: After the merchant completes the blind box opening in the live room, then the blind box results are transmitted back to the platform, after which the user can view the unboxing results in the order details
- Request schema: `Order_202511_UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResults_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Order_202511_UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResults_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| blind_box_results | array<Order_202511_UpdateTheBlindBoxOpeningResults_RequestBody_BlindBoxResults> | no |  | Unboxing results for line items under orders. |
| blind_box_results[].blind_open_time | integer:int64 | no |  | Unboxing timestamp. Only UNIX format is accepted. |
| blind_box_results[].blind_result_product_id | string | no |  | Unboxing results corresponding to TikTok Shop product id. |
| blind_box_results[].blind_result_sku_id | string | no |  | Unboxing results corresponding to TikTok Shop sku id. |
| blind_box_results[].order_line_id | string | no |  | Line item id in TikTok Shop. |
| main_order_id | string | no |  | The unique identifier for a TikTok Shop order. |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | object | no |  |  |
| data | object | no |  |  |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### GET /product/202309/brands

- Summary: GetBrands
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Retrieve all available brands for your shop, including the built-in brands and any custom brands created using the [Create Custom Brands API](650a0926f1fd3102b91bbfb0). Pass the returned brand ID when creating or editing a product to associate the brand with the product. - To check if a brand is fully authorized for use in a specific product category, specify the **category ID**. - To obtain the full list of brands that your shop can potentially use and their authorization status, omit the category ID. We recommend that you specify the **brand name** to narrow down the list of brands return...
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_GetBrands_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| category_id | query | no | string | Specify a category ID to show the availability of **authorized brands** in the category. **Note**: Specify this value to obtain an accurate list of brands that you can use in a category. |
| is_authorized | query | no | boolean | Filter results by the brand authorization status. Possible values: - 1: Returns only authorized brands - 0: Returns all brands |
| brand_name | query | no | string | Filter results to include brand names that begin with the specified value. |
| page_size | query | yes | integer:int32 | The number of results to be returned per page. Valid range: [1-100] |
| page_token | query | no | string | An opaque token used to retrieve the next page of a paginated result set. Retrieve this value from the result of the `next_page_token` from a previous response. It is not needed for the first page. |
| category_version | query | no | string | Filter categories by the category tree version.Possible values based on region: - US, EU and SEA: v2, represents the 7-level category tree. Important: For US, EU and SEA shops, you must pass v2 when using this API. - Other regions: v1, represents the 3-leve... |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

_None._

#### Response Fields

| data.brands[].authorized_status | string | no |  | A status to indicate whether the seller has obtained prior authorization to sell goods bearing the brand's trademark, name, or logo. Possible values: - UNAUTHORIEZD - AUTHORIZED **Note**: If the brand is unauthorized, check `is_t1_brand` to determine if you... |
| data.brands[].brand_status | string | no |  | The availability of an **authorized brand** in the requested category. Possible values: - AVAILABLE - UNAVAILABLE **Note**: Not applicable if you did not specify the category ID, or the brand is unauthorized. |
| data.brands[].id | string | no |  | The brand ID. |
| data.brands[].is_t1_brand | boolean | no |  | A flag to indicate whether the brand is a T1 brand, which refers to internationally renowned brands that may have compliance risks and require sellers to obtain brand authorization. **Note**: - You cannot create products with unauthorized T1 brands. - You c... |
| data.brands[].name | string | no |  | The brand name. |
