### POST /product/202309/brands

- Summary: CreateCustomBrands
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Create custom brands for your own use across all markets. Authorization is not required when creating a brand. You can create the brand first and obtain brand authorization later through the Qualification Center in TikTok Shop Seller Center. **Note**: You can create up to 50 brands per day, with a total limit of 1,000 brands.
- Request schema: `Product_202309_CreateCustomBrands_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_CreateCustomBrands_Response`

| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| name | string | no |  | The brand name. **Note**: - Length: [2, 30] - No language restrictions, but do not use Chinese. - The name will not be translated into multiple languages. |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### GET /product/202309/categories

- Summary: GetCategories
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Retrieve the list of product categories available for your shop. Product categories are updated frequently, so it's recommended to call the API in real time to ensure you are using the latest category data. Caching category data locally may result in using outdated information, leading to errors when creating products. **For the Indonesia market**: To list a product on both TikTok Shop and Tokopedia, you must use only categories that are available on both platforms. Please call this API twice to identify the overlapping categories.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_GetCategories_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| locale | query | no | string | The BCP-47 locale codes for displaying category information. Default: The default locale of your shop. Possible values: - `cs-CZ` - `de-AT` - `de-BE` - `de-DE` - `el-GR` - `en-GB` - `en-IE` - `en-US` - `es-ES` - `es-MX` - `fr-FR` - `fr-BE` - `hu-HU` - `id-I... |
| keyword | query | no | string | Filter categories by this keyword in `local_name`. |
| category_version | query | no | string | Filter categories by the category tree version.Possible values based on region: - US, EU and SEA: v2, represents the 7-level category tree. Important: For US, EU and SEA shops, you must pass v2 when using this API. - Other regions: v1, represents the 3-leve... |
| listing_platform | query | no | string | Filter categories by the specified platform. Possible values: - TIKTOK_SHOP - TOKOPEDIA Default: TIKTOK_SHOP Applicable only for sellers that migrated from Tokopedia. |
| include_prohibited_categories | query | no | boolean | A flag to indicate whether to include categories that are prohibited on TikTok Shop. Set this to `true` to identify which are the product categories that you can't list on TikTok Shop in any circumstances. Applicable only for BR, MX, EU and SEA markets. |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

_None._

### POST /product/202309/categories/recommend

- Summary: RecommendCategory
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Retrieve the recommended category for a candidate product based on its title, description, and images. If you are syncing product catalogs from an external system to TikTok Shop, use this API to facilitate product categorization. **Note**: The language used in text fields such as descriptions and titles must align with the target market's language (e.g. don't use Chinese).

### GET /product/202309/categories/{category_id}/attributes

### POST /product/202309/files/upload

- Summary: UploadProductFile
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Upload non-image files, such as PDF or video to TikTok Shop. Use this API when you need to add videos to your product to improve the shopping experience, or submit certifications or reports to meet TikTok Shop requirements for listing restricted products. **Note**: You must store the response body to retrieve the ID or URL required to associate the file with a product during product creation or editing.
- Request schema: `Product_202309_UploadProductFile_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_UploadProductFile_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: multipart/form-data |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| data | string:binary | no |  | The local file to be uploaded. **Note**： - Supported formats: PDF, MP4, MOV, MKV, WMV, WEBM, AVI, 3GP, FLV, MPEG - Max PDF size: 20 MB - Max video size: 100 MB - Video aspect ratio: 9:16 to 16:9 **Recommendations for product videos**: - Aspect ratio: 1:1 - ... |

### GET /product/202309/global_categories

- Summary: GetGlobalCategories
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Retrieve all available product categories, regardless of market variations. Product categories are updated frequently, so it's recommended to call the API in real time to ensure you are using the latest category data. Caching category data locally may result in using outdated information, leading to errors when creating global products.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_GetGlobalCategories_Response`

| keyword | query | no | string | Filter categories by this keyword in `local_name`. |
| category_version | query | no | string | Filter categories by the category tree version.Possible values based on region: - US, EU and SEA: v2, represents the 7-level category tree. Important: For US, EU and SEA shops, you must pass v2 when using this API. - Other regions: v1, represents the 3-leve... |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |

### POST /product/202309/global_categories/recommend

- Summary: RecommendGlobalCategories
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Retrieve the recommended categories for a candidate global product based on its title, description, and images. If you are syncing product catalogs from an external system to TikTok Shop, use this API to facilitate product classification. **Note**: Double-byte characters (e.g. Chinese characters) are not supported in text fields such as descriptions and titles. If you include them, the API request will fail.
- Request schema: `Product_202309_RecommendGlobalCategories_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_RecommendGlobalCategories_Response`

| name | in | required | type | description |

| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| category_version | string | no |  | The category tree version to use for this product. Possible values based on region: - US: `v2`, represents the 7-level category tree. **Important**: If the seller account contains an active US shop, you must pass `v2` when using this API. - Other regions: `... |
| description | string | no |  | The product description in HTML format. **Note**: - The content must conform to the [HTML syntax](https://html.spec.whatwg.org/). All HTML tags are accepted but to optimize display on the TikTok Shop product detail page, the system will automatically conver... |
| images | array<Product_202309_RecommendGlobalCategories_RequestBody_Images> | no |  | Product images, including gallery images, images that appear in the description, product variant images. |
| images[].uri | string | no |  | The URI of the image. Retrieve the URI from the [Upload Product Image API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6509df95defece02be598a22). |
| product_title | string | no |  | The product title. Title length: - DE, ES, FR, IE, IT, JP, UK, US: [1, 255] - MX:[1,300] - Other regions: [25, 255] |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |

### POST /product/202309/global_products

- Summary: CreateGlobalProduct
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Create global products to be sold in one or multiple shops outside of the seller's base country. You can only create global products in `AVAILABLE` product categories. For other categories, contact your account manager for assistance. After product creation, use the [Publish Global Product API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650a64d6defece02be678fd6) to publish and translate the product in the desired markets. **Key concept**: Global products are products created by cross-border sellers to be sold in shops outside of their base country. ### POST /product/202309/global_products/search

- Summary: SearchGlobalProducts
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Search your catalog to retrieve a list of global products based on filter conditions through this API. If you need to get detailed information about a global product, use the global product ID response in the "Get Global Product" API.
- Request schema: `Product_202309_SearchGlobalProducts_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_SearchGlobalProducts_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| page_size | query | yes | integer:int32 | "page_size" represents the return list pagination, the number of global products per page. Each page can retrieve up to 100 global product records. |
| page_token | query | no | string | The pagination token is a cursor used for pagination. It is not needed for the first page. The token is returned in the previous pagination query to determine the current position. |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| create_time_ge | integer:int64 | no |  | The fields "create_time_ge" and "create_time_le" together constitute the filter condition for the creation time of the global product. - If you only fill in the "create_time_le", and the "create_time_ge" is empty , then we will set the earliest time of the ... |
| create_time_le | integer:int64 | no |  | Refer to the description of "create_time_ge". |

### GET /product/202309/global_products/{global_product_id}

- Summary: GetGlobalProduct
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Retrieve all properties of a global product that is in the "DRAFT", "UNPUBLISHED", or "PUBLISHED" status, and the corresponding local product IDs in the published markets.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_GetGlobalProduct_Response`

| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

### PUT /product/202309/global_products/{global_product_id}

- Summary: EditGlobalProduct
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Edit all properties (e.g. description, brand, images, attributes) of a global product. **IMPORTANT**: For published products, the changes will be automatically retranslated and synced to all markets where the product is published. If you have already edited the product information or translations of the associated local products, they will be overwritten by the information in this API. For example, if you have customized the local prices such as the local pre-tax price or the local display price, they will be overwritten each time this API is called. **Note**: - There may be a limit to the ...
- Request schema: `Product_202309_EditGlobalProduct_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_EditGlobalProduct_Response`

| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

### POST /product/202309/global_products/{global_product_id}/inventory/update

- Summary: UpdateGlobalInventory
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Update the inventory of unpublished global products if you have access to the Multi-Warehouse feature. The inventory of published global products will not be affected by this update operation.
- Request schema: `Product_202309_UpdateGlobalInventory_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_UpdateGlobalInventory_Response`

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| global_product_id | path | yes | string | The global product ID to be updated. |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| global_skus | array<Product_202309_UpdateGlobalInventory_RequestBody_GlobalSkus> | no |  | The list of global SKUs that need to be updated. |
| global_skus[].id | string | no |  | The global SKU ID in TikTok Shop. |
| global_skus[].inventory | array<Product_202309_UpdateGlobalInventory_RequestBody_GlobalSkus_Inventory> | no |  | Global SKU inventory information. |

| global_skus[].inventory[].quantity | integer:int32 | no |  | The updated SKU quantity. |

| data | object | no |  |  |

### POST /product/202309/global_products/{global_product_id}/publish

- Summary: PublishGlobalProduct
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Publish and convert a global product to local products in one or multiple shops in supported markets. After publishing, the product is sent for review by TikTok Shop in the respective markets. For sellers in the EU market, the provided information will also be automatically translated into all EU languages supported by TikTok Shop. **Note**: - You can only publish in each market once. To change product information, edit the global product by using the [Edit Global Product API](6509e1bcc16ffe02b8dc3cd7). The changes will be automatically synchronized to all markets where the product is publi...
- Request schema: `Product_202309_PublishGlobalProduct_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_PublishGlobalProduct_Response`

### POST /product/202309/images/upload

- Summary: UploadProductImage
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Upload local images to TikTok Shop for use as product images, variant images, size charts, certification images and so on. **Note**: - All images used in TikTok Shop products must be uploaded through this API. You will not be able to use any image URLs that are not hosted by TikTok Shop. - You must store the response body to retrieve the ID or URL required to associate the image with a product during product creation or editing.
- Request schema: `Product_202309_UploadProductImage_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_UploadProductImage_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: multipart/form-data |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| data | string:binary | no |  | The local image file to be uploaded. **Note**: - Supported formats: JPG, JPEG, PNG, WEBP, HEIC, BMP - Max size: 10MB - Dimensions: [100x100 px, 20000x20000 px] - For `use_case=MAIN_IMAGE`, the dimensions must be between 300x300 px and 4000x4000 px. - For `u... |
| use_case | string | no |  | The usage scenario of the image. Possible values: - MAIN_IMAGE: An image displayed in the product image gallery. - ATTRIBUTE_IMAGE: An image that represents a product variant (e.g. color). - DESCRIPTION_IMAGE: An image used within the product description. -... |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Product_202309_UploadProductImage_Response_Data | no | Product_202309_UploadProductImage_Response_Data |  |
| data.height | integer:int32 | no |  | The height of the image after aspect ratio adjustment. |
| data.uri | string | no |  | The URI to identify the image in API requests and responses. Pass this value when creating or editing a product to associate the image with the product. |
| data.url | string | no |  | The URL to access and view the image. Use this URL in product descriptions by embedding it within an HTML `<img>` tag. |
| data.use_case | string | no |  | The usage scenario specified during upload. Possible values: - MAIN_IMAGE - ATTRIBUTE_IMAGE - DESCRIPTION_IMAGE - CERTIFICATION_IMAGE - SIZE_CHART_IMAGE |
| data.width | integer:int32 | no |  | The width of the image after aspect ratio adjustment. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### POST /product/202309/inventory/search

- Summary: InventorySearch
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Retrieve inventory information for multiple products or SKUs. **Note**: - Searches can be based on either product IDs or SKU IDs, not both at the same time. - Passing Product IDs returns the inventory information of all SKUs under the specified products. - Passing SKU IDs returns the inventory information for the specified SKUs.
- Request schema: `Product_202309_InventorySearch_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_InventorySearch_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| product_ids | array<string> | no |  | A list of product IDs used to search for inventory information. Max IDs: 100 |
| product_ids[] | string | no |  |  |
| sku_ids | array<string> | no |  | A list of SKU IDs used to search for inventory information. Max IDs: 600 **Note**: If both `sku_ids` and `product_ids` are passed, `sku_ids` will take precedence. |
| sku_ids[] | string | no |  |  |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Product_202309_InventorySearch_Response_Data | no | Product_202309_InventorySearch_Response_Data |  |
| data.inventory | array<Product_202309_InventorySearch_Response_Data_Inventory> | no |  | Inventory information for the requested products or SKUs. |
| data.inventory[].product_id | string | no |  | The ID of the requested product. |
| data.inventory[].skus | array<Product_202309_InventorySearch_Response_Data_Inventory_Skus> | no |  | The list of requested SKUs. |
| data.inventory[].skus[].id | string | no |  | The SKU ID generated by TikTok Shop. |
| data.inventory[].skus[].seller_sku | string | no |  | An internal code/name for managing SKUs, not visible to buyers. |
| data.inventory[].skus[].total_available_inventory_distribution | Product_202309_InventorySearch_Response_Data_Inventory_Skus_TotalAvailableInventoryDistribution | no | Product_202309_InventorySearch_Response_Data_Inventory_Skus_TotalAvailableInventoryDistribution |  |
| data.inventory[].skus[].total_available_inventory_distribution.campaign_inventory | array<Product_202309_InventorySearch_Response_Data_Inventory_Skus_TotalAvailableInventoryDistribution_CampaignInventory> | no |  | Inventory that is allocated to a specific campaign. |
| data.inventory[].skus[].total_available_inventory_distribution.campaign_inventory[].campaign_name | string | no |  | The name of the associated campaign. |
| data.inventory[].skus[].total_available_inventory_distribution.campaign_inventory[].quantity | integer:int32 | no |  | The number of units allocated. |
| data.inventory[].skus[].total_available_inventory_distribution.creator_inventory | array<Product_202309_InventorySearch_Response_Data_Inventory_Skus_TotalAvailableInventoryDistribution_CreatorInventory> | no |  | Inventory that is allocated to TikTok creators. |
| data.inventory[].skus[].total_available_inventory_distribution.creator_inventory[].creator_name | string | no |  | The name of the associated TikTok creator. |
| data.inventory[].skus[].total_available_inventory_distribution.creator_inventory[].quantity | integer:int32 | no |  | The number of units allocated. |
| data.inventory[].skus[].total_available_inventory_distribution.in_shop_inventory | Product_202309_InventorySearch_Response_Data_Inventory_Skus_TotalAvailableInventoryDistribution_InShopInventory | no | Product_202309_InventorySearch_Response_Data_Inventory_Skus_TotalAvailableInventoryDistribution_InShopInventory |  |
| data.inventory[].skus[].total_available_inventory_distribution.in_shop_inventory.quantity | integer:int32 | no |  | The number of units allocated. |
| data.inventory[].skus[].total_available_quantity | integer:int32 | no |  | The total number of units available for ordering across all warehouses. It is the sum of the `warehouse_inventory.available_quantity` values in all warehouses. |
| data.inventory[].skus[].total_committed_quantity | integer:int32 | no |  | The total number of units reserved by existing customer orders across all warehouses (and therefore not available for ordering). It is the sum of the `warehouse_inventory.committed_quantity` values in all warehouses. |
| data.inventory[].skus[].warehouse_inventory | array<Product_202309_InventorySearch_Response_Data_Inventory_Skus_WarehouseInventory> | no |  | SKU warehouse inventory information. |
| data.inventory[].skus[].warehouse_inventory[].available_quantity | integer:int32 | no |  | The total number of units available for ordering in this warehouse. This is equivalent to the `inventory.quantity` value returned in the [Get Product API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6509d85b4a0bb702c057fdda). |

| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### DELETE /product/202309/products

- Summary: DeleteProducts
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Delete non-frozen products that you no longer need. **For the Indonesia market**: You can only delete products that are not frozen on all listing platforms. If the product is frozen on any platform, it cannot be deleted.
- Request schema: `Product_202309_DeleteProducts_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_DeleteProducts_Response`

### POST /product/202309/products/activate

- Summary: ActivateProduct
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Activate hidden products that are in the `Seller_deactivated` or `Platform_deactivated` status and display them in the TikTok Shop catalog. After submitting the activation request, the products will be sent to TikTok Shop for auditing and their status will change to `Pending`. If a product passes the audit, its status will change back to `Activate`. You can use the [Product status change webhook](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650956aff1fd3102b90b6261) to monitor the audit status.
- Request schema: `Product_202309_ActivateProduct_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_ActivateProduct_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| listing_platforms | array<string> | no |  | The listing platforms where the product will be activated. Possible values: - TOKOPEDIA - TIKTOK_SHOP Default: TIKTOK_SHOP Applicable only for sellers that migrated from Tokopedia. |
| listing_platforms[] | string | no |  |  |
| product_ids | array<string> | no |  | The product IDs to activate. Max number of IDs: 20 |
| product_ids[] | string | no |  |  |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Product_202309_ActivateProduct_Response_Data | no | Product_202309_ActivateProduct_Response_Data |  |
| data.errors | array<Product_202309_ActivateProduct_Response_Data_Errors> | no |  | The list of errors that occurred. |
| data.errors[].code | integer:int32 | no |  | The main error code. |
| data.errors[].detail | Product_202309_ActivateProduct_Response_Data_Errors_Detail | no | Product_202309_ActivateProduct_Response_Data_Errors_Detail |  |
| data.errors[].detail.extra_errors | array<Product_202309_ActivateProduct_Response_Data_Errors_Detail_ExtraErrors> | no |  | A list of further nested errors or issues related to the main error. |
| data.errors[].detail.extra_errors[].code | integer:int32 | no |  | The secondary error code. |
| data.errors[].detail.extra_errors[].message | string | no |  | The secondary error message. |
| data.errors[].detail.product_id | string | no |  | The ID of the product that could not be activated. |
| data.errors[].message | string | no |  | The main error message. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### POST /product/202309/products/deactivate

- Summary: DeactivateProducts
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Deactivate products that are in the `Activate` status and hide them from buyers. The status changes to `Seller_deactivated` after deactivation. In the event there's some issue with a product (e.g. out of stock), you can deactivate the product and hide it temporarily from buyers. When the issues are resolved, you can activate the product again by using the [Activate Product API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650306ff5a12ff0294eab4a9).
- Request schema: `Product_202309_DeactivateProducts_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_DeactivateProducts_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| listing_platforms | array<string> | no |  | The listing platforms where the product will be deactivated. Possible values: - TOKOPEDIA - TIKTOK_SHOP Default: TIKTOK_SHOP Applicable only for sellers that migrated from Tokopedia. |
| listing_platforms[] | string | no |  |  |
| product_ids | array<string> | no |  | The product IDs to deactivate. Max number of IDs: 20. |
| product_ids[] | string | no |  |  |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| data | Product_202309_DeactivateProducts_Response_Data | no | Product_202309_DeactivateProducts_Response_Data |  |
| data.errors | array<Product_202309_DeactivateProducts_Response_Data_Errors> | no |  | The list of errors that occurred. |
| data.errors[].code | integer:int32 | no |  | The main error code. |
| data.errors[].detail | Product_202309_DeactivateProducts_Response_Data_Errors_Detail | no | Product_202309_DeactivateProducts_Response_Data_Errors_Detail |  |
| data.errors[].detail.product_id | string | no |  | The ID of the product that could not be deactivated. |
| data.errors[].message | string | no |  | The main error message. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### POST /product/202309/products/listing_check

- Summary: CheckProductListing
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Identify any issues with your product properties in advance to ensure your product is ready for listing. Every product must meet TikTok Shop requirements before it can be listed. Before listing, you can submit all relevant product information to this API to check whether a listing meets these requirements. You'll receive a list of issues to resolve before listing. This process helps reduce the risk of failure when creating products. **Note**: - The language used in the product content must align with the target market's language (e.g. don't use Chinese), otherwise the listing will fail or b...
- Request schema: `Product_202309_CheckProductListing_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_CheckProductListing_Response`

### POST /product/202309/products/recover

- Summary: RecoverProducts
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Recover products that are in the `Deleted` status. The status changes to `Seller_deactivated` after recovery.
- Request schema: `Product_202309_RecoverProducts_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_RecoverProducts_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| product_ids | array<string> | no |  | The product IDs to recover. Max number of IDs: 20. |
| product_ids[] | string | no |  |  |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |

### POST /product/202309/products/search

- Summary: SearchProducts
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Retrieve a list of products that meet the specified conditions. This API will only return the key product properties. You can pass a returned product ID to the [Get Product API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6509d85b4a0bb702c057fdda) to obtain more details about the product.

Possible values based on region: - US: `v2`, represents the 7-level category tree. - Other regions: `v1`, represents the 3-level category tree. ### PUT /product/202309/products/{product_id}

- Summary: EditProduct
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Edit all properties (e.g. description, brand, images) of an existing product that is not in the `FREEZE` or `DELETED` state. After editing the product, the latest product content (referred to as v2) will be resent for audit review. If the audit passes, v2 is published to the shop, otherwise, the existing product stays live and remains unchanged (keeping v1). However, edits to the `price` or `inventory` fields do not require a reaudit and will be immediately published on the platform. Use the [Product status change](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650956aff1fd3102b90b6261) webhook ...
- Request schema: `Product_202309_EditProduct_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_EditProduct_Response`

| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| auto_translate_enabled | boolean | no |  | The field works only if products need to list with more than one languages in determined country, otherwise it does not need to fill in. |

| category_id | string | no |  | The ID of the category of this product. It must be a leaf category that corresponds to the category tree type specified in the `category_version` property. Use the [Get Categories API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6509c89d0fcef602bf1acd9b) to o... |
| category_version | string | no |  | Filter categories by the category tree version.Possible values based on region: - US, EU and SEA: v2, represents the 7-level category tree. Important: For US, EU and SEA shops, you must pass v2 when using this API. - Other regions: v1, represents the 3-leve... |

Max count: 10 As per TikTok Shop guidelines, certifications are required for certain restricted product categories. Retrieve the certification requirements for your product from the [Get Category Rules API](https... |
| certifications[].expiration_date | integer:int64 | no |  | The expiration date of this certification expressed in unix timestamp (seconds) UTC+0. This field may be required for certain certifications. Use the [Get Category Rules API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6509c0febace3e02b74594a9) to find out th... |

### POST /product/202309/products/{product_id}/inventory/update

- Summary: UpdateInventory
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Update the inventory quantity of SKUs belonging to a product. The SKU ID must belong to a product that is **not** in `FREEZE` or `DELETED` status.
- Request schema: `Product_202309_UpdateInventory_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_UpdateInventory_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| product_id | path | yes | string | The product ID generated by TikTok Shop. |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| skus | array<Product_202309_UpdateInventory_RequestBody_Skus> | no |  | A list of Stock Keeping Units (SKUs) used to identify distinct variants of the product. |
| skus[].id | string | no |  | The SKU ID generated by TikTok Shop. One product can contain multiple SKU IDs. **Note**: - The SKU ID must belong to a product that is not in `FREEZE` or `DELETED` status. - If you are updating multiple SKUs, all the SKU IDs must belong to the same product. |
| skus[].inventory | array<Product_202309_UpdateInventory_RequestBody_Skus_Inventory> | no |  | SKU inventory information. **Note**: You must include all warehouse IDs assigned to this SKU, along with the respective quantity. Do not omit any or add unrelated warehouses. |
| skus[].inventory[].backorder_quantity | integer:int32 | no |  | The `backorder_quantity` will automatically be converted to `quantity` once in-stock inventory is sold out. The fulfillment of this inventory follows the `handling_time` specified below. Note: Any existing `backorder_quantity` will persist if no update is p... |
| skus[].inventory[].handling_time | integer:int32 | no |  | The estimated number of working days needed for a backorder to be shipped. Currently, different warehouses for the same SKU are not allowed to have different `handling_time` |
| skus[].inventory[].quantity | integer:int32 | no |  | The total SKU quantity available in the warehouse. Valid range: [1, 99,999] Note: This quantity specifically refers to the in-stock inventory that can be shipped immediately. |
| skus[].inventory[].warehouse_id | string | no |  | The ID of the warehouse where the SKU is stored. Retrieve this value from the [Get Product API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6509d85b4a0bb702c057fdda). **Note**: Optional if there is only 1 warehouse. Otherwise, please provide this ID. |

| data.errors | array<Product_202309_UpdateInventory_Response_Data_Errors> | no |  | The list of errors that occurred. |

### POST /product/202309/products/{product_id}/partial_edit

- Summary: PartialEditProduct
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Edit some properties (e.g. description, images, attributes) of a product that is not in the `FREEZE` or `DELETED` state. After editing the product, the latest product content (referred to as v2) will be resent for audit review. If the audit passes, v2 is published to the shop, otherwise, the existing product stays live and remains unchanged (keeping v1). However, edits to the `price` or `inventory` fields do not require a reaudit and will be immediately published on the platform. Use the [Product status change](650956aff1fd3102b90b6261) webhook to keep track of the review status. **Note**: ...
- Request schema: `Product_202309_PartialEditProduct_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202309_PartialEditProduct_Response`

| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

### POST /product/202312/global_products/search

- Summary: SearchGlobalProducts
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Retrieve a list of global products that meet the specified conditions. This API will only return the key product properties. You can pass a returned global product ID to the [Get Global Product API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6509e2b0bace3e02b7490c96) to obtain more details about the product.
- Request schema: `Product_202312_SearchGlobalProducts_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202312_SearchGlobalProducts_Response`

| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

Unix timestamp. **Note**: The fields "update_time_ge" and "update_time_le" together define the update time filter condition. - If "update_time_ge" is filled ... |
| update_time_le | integer:int64 | no |  | Filter global products to show only those that are updated on or before the specified date and time. Unix timestamp. Refer to notes in `update_time_ge` for more usage information. |

### GET /product/202312/prerequisites

- Summary: CheckListingPrerequisites
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Check if a TikTok shop is ready to list products. Each shop needs to satisfy a series of TikTok Shop requirements before you can start listing products. Before you proceed to list products, use this API to check if your shop has satisfied all requirements. **Tip**: We recommend that you run this check before any bulk updates to avoid listing issues. For example, sellers may change the delivery option to "Shipped by seller" but fail to add a shipping template, thus blocking the shop from listing products. In this case, the API would return `is_failed=true` for the `SHIPPING_TEMPLATE` check i...
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Product_202312_CheckListingPrerequisites_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

### POST /product/202312/products/search

- Summary: SearchProducts
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Retrieve a list of products that meet the specified conditions. This API will only return the key product properties. You can pass a returned product ID to the [Get Product API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6509d85b4a0bb702c057fdda) to obtain more details about the product.

### POST /product/202404/images/optimize

- Summary: OptimizedImages
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Optimize images used in your TikTok Shop by changing the background to white. This is especially useful for images displayed in the product image gallery as it enhances product visibility. **Note**: - The images to be optimized must first be uploaded to TikTok Shop through the [Upload Product Image API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6509df95defece02be598a22). You will not be able to optimize any images that are not hosted by TikTok Shop. - Images that were previously optimized will not be processed again. - The optimization is processed asynchronously and typically completes wit...

### GET /product/202405/products/diagnoses

- Summary: ProductInformationIssueDiagnosis
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Diagnose multiple existing live (status: `ACTIVATE`) products to obtain information that helps you to improve the product content, enhancing product visibility and customer trust. The returned information includes: - Listing quality information (available only for the US market). - Issues with the current product details and the overall recommendations - Auto-generated optimization suggestions targeted for specific product fields, including the title, description, and image. **Note**: This API focuses solely on optimizing product visibility and does not evaluate whether your product meets l...
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Product_202405_ProductInformationIssueDiagnosis_Response`

### POST /product/202407/products/category_upgrade_task

- Summary: CreateCategoryUpgradeTask
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Create a task to upgrade live products (status: `ACTIVATE`) from a 3-level to a 7-level category tree. The task runs for up to 2 hours, depending on the number of products. If the upgrade is incomplete after 2 hours, call the API again. To figure out which products' categories have not been upgraded, call the [Search Product API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/65854ffb8f559302d8a6acda) and set "category_version" to "v1". **Note**: You must wait at least 24 hours after a product goes live to successfully upgrade its category. If you call this API on the same day a new product goes...
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Product_202407_CreateCategoryUpgradeTask_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| data | object | no |  |  |

### POST /product/202409/compliance/manufacturers

- Summary: CreateManufacturer
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Add a manufacturer for a seller. The provided information will be automatically translated into all EU languages supported by TikTok Shop. - Use the [Search Manufacturers API](67066a580dcee902fa03ccf9) to obtain the translations. - Use the [Partial Edit Manufacturer API](67066a55c55b3a03044eea29) to edit the translations, if necessary. - When creating a product, pass the returned `manufacturer_id` to associate the product with the manufacturer. Target seller: Local sellers operating in EU countries
- Request schema: `Product_202409_CreateManufacturer_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202409_CreateManufacturer_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| address | string | no |  | The postal address of the manufacturer. Max length: 500 characters |
| email | string | no |  | The email address of the manufacturer. |
| locale | string | no |  | The BCP-47 locale code representing the language used for specifying the manufacturer information. Possible values: - de-DE - en-IE - es-ES - fr-FR - it-IT Default: The locale of the seller's registered business address. **Note**: The information provided w... |
| name | string | no |  | The manufacturer name. Max length: 255 characters |
| phone_number | Product_202409_CreateManufacturer_RequestBody_PhoneNumber | no | Product_202409_CreateManufacturer_RequestBody_PhoneNumber |  |
| phone_number.availability | string | no |  | Indicates the availability of the phone number. Possible values: - `AVAILABLE`: The phone number is available and required. - `UNAVAILABLE`: No phone number is available. Default: AVAILABLE |
| phone_number.country_code | string | no |  | The country code of the phone number, prefixed by a plus `+` symbol. E.g. +353 for Ireland. Max digits: 4 Required if `availability=AVAILABLE`. |
| phone_number.local_number | string | no |  | The local number. Length: 7 - 20 digits Required if `availability=AVAILABLE`. |
| registered_trade_name | string | no |  | The registered trade name of the manufacturer. Max length: 200 characters |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |

| data.manufacturer_id | string | no |  | A unique ID that identifies the manufacturer in TikTok Shop. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### POST /product/202409/compliance/manufacturers/{manufacturer_id}/partial_edit

- Summary: PartialEditManufacturer
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Edit the details of a manufacturer in the EU languages supported by TikTok Shop. Include the locale code to edit the responsible person's information in a particular language. Target seller: Local sellers operating in EU countries **Note**: - Updates are handled per top-level property, so all non-empty fields within an updated object must be supplied to prevent overwriting with blanks. - For top-level properties (e.g. `name`, `email`) that are not nested in an object, you can update them individually. Omitting these properties in the request will leave them unchanged. - If you need to edit ...

### POST /product/202409/compliance/responsible_persons

- Summary: CreateResponsiblePerson
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Add a new EU responsible person who ensures a seller's products comply with EU regulations. The provided information will be automatically translated into all EU languages supported by TikTok Shop. - Use the [Search Responsible Persons API](67066a55f17b7d02f95d2fb1) to obtain the translations. - Use the [Partial Edit Responsible Person API](67066a5587019802fdce19b3) to edit the translations, if necessary. - When creating a product, pass the returned `responsible_person_id` to associate the product with the responsible person. Target seller: Local sellers operating in EU countries
- Request schema: `Product_202409_CreateResponsiblePerson_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202409_CreateResponsiblePerson_Response`

- Summary: PartialEditResponsiblePerson

### POST /product/202411/products/diagnose_optimize

- Summary: DiagnoseandOptimizeProduct
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Diagnose products to obtain information that helps you to improve the product content, enhancing product visibility and customer trust. The returned information includes: - Listing quality information (available only for the US market). - Issues with the current product details and the overall recommendations - Auto-generated optimization suggestions targeted for specific product fields, including the title, description, and image. This API enables you to diagnose both live products (status: `ACTIVATE`) and brand-new products not yet listed in TikTok Shop. - To diagnose a **live product**, ...

### POST /product/202501/compliance/responsible_persons/search

- Summary: SearchResponsiblePersons
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Retrieve a list of responsible persons in the EU languages supported by TikTok Shop based on their ID or keywords. When creating a product, pass the returned `responsible_person_id` to associate the product with the responsible person. Target seller: Local sellers operating in EU countries
- Request schema: `Product_202501_SearchResponsiblePersons_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202501_SearchResponsiblePersons_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| page_size | query | yes | integer:int64 | The number of results to be returned per page. Valid range: [1-100] |
| page_token | query | no | string | An opaque token used to retrieve the next page of a paginated result set. Retrieve this value from the result of the `next_page_token` from a previous response. It is not needed for the first page. |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| keyword | string | no |  | Filter results to show those that contain this keyword. Search scope: name, local_number, email Max length: 200 characters **Note**: Provide either the `responsible_person_ids` or `keyword`; if both are provided, `responsible_person_ids` will take priority. |
| locales | array<string> | no |  | The BCP-47 locale codes for displaying the responsible person information. Default: The locale of the seller's registered business address. Possible values: - de-DE - en-IE - es-ES - fr-FR - it-IT |
| locales[] | string | no |  |  |
| responsible_person_ids | array<string> | no |  | Filter results by these responsible person IDs. Max IDs: The value of `page_size` |
| responsible_person_ids[] | string | no |  |  |

- Summary: SearchProducts
- Operation ID: `-`

You can pass a returned product ID to the [Get Product API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6509d85b4a0bb702c057fdda) to obtain more details about the product.

## product_v202505

| method | path | summary |

| POST | `/product/202505/images/translation_tasks` | CreateImageTranslationTasks |

### POST /product/202505/images/translation_tasks

- Summary: CreateImageTranslationTasks
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Initiates a translation task for one or more images. This asynchronous API queues the images for processing in the specified target language. Applicable only for sellers that sell across EU. Use the [Image Translation Completed webhook](684f8d9bcc4e44049347a12e) to monitor the translation progress, or pass the task ID to the [Get Image Translation Tasks API](684f8b2d535a9d048f234564) to retrieve the status and the translated images. **Note**: - Please wait 5 minutes after task creation before calling the Get endpoint, and retry at intervals over 10 seconds to avoid rate limiting. - Each tas...
- Request schema: `Product_202505_CreateImageTranslationTasks_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202505_CreateImageTranslationTasks_Response`

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| images | array<Product_202505_CreateImageTranslationTasks_RequestBody_Images> | no |  | The list of images to translate. Use the [Upload Product Image API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6509df95defece02be598a22) to upload the images first and obtain the corresponding image URIs. **Note**: The total number of image and target langua... |
| images[].image_uri | string | no |  | The URI of the image, retrieved from the [Upload Product Image API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6509df95defece02be598a22) **Recommendation**: Specify up to 5 images to avoid exceeding the task limit per call. |
| images[].target_languages | array<string> | no |  | The target languages to translate the image into. You can specify multiple target languages for each image. Possible values: - `cs-CZ` - `da-DK` - `de-AT` - `de-BE` - `de-DE` - `el-GR` - `en-GB` - `en-IE` - `es-ES` - `fi-FI` - `fr-FR` - `fr-BE` - `hu-HU` - ... |
| images[].target_languages[] | string | no |  |  |

Each task corresponds to the translation of 1 image into 1 target language. So if you specified 2 target languages for an image, 2 tasks will be created. |
| data.translation_tasks[].id | string | no |  | The ID to identify the image translation task. Pass this ID to the [Get Image Translation Tasks API](684f8b2d535a9d048f234564) to retrieve the task status and the translated image URIs. |
| data.translation_tasks[].image_uri | string | no |  | The URI of the image to translate. |
| data.translation_tasks[].target_language | string | no |  | The target languages to translate the image into. You can specify multiple target languages for each image. Possible values: - de-DE - en-IE - es-ES - fr-FR - it-IT |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### GET /product/202506/images/translation_tasks

- Summary: GetImageTranslationTasks
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Retrieves the image translation task status and translated images for one or more previously submitted images. **Note**: Please wait 5 minutes after [task creation](684f8b2d6e0b37048b2448b4) before calling this API, and retry at intervals over 10 seconds to avoid rate limiting. Applicable only for sellers that sell across EU.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Product_202506_GetImageTranslationTasks_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| translation_task_ids | query | no | array<string> | The image translation task IDs for retrieving translation results. Max count: 20 |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Product_202506_GetImageTranslationTasks_Response_Data | no | Product_202506_GetImageTranslationTasks_Response_Data |  |
| data.translation_tasks | array<Product_202506_GetImageTranslationTasks_Response_Data_TranslationTasks> | no |  | The requested translation tasks and the corresponding results. Each task corresponds to the translation of 1 image into 1 target language. |
| data.translation_tasks[].fail_reason | string | no |  | The reason why the translation task failed. Possible values: - Invalid image URI. - Internal processing error, please try calling this endpoint again. - This image can't be translated. Try a different image. |
| data.translation_tasks[].id | string | no |  | The ID to identify the image translation task. |
| data.translation_tasks[].original_image | Product_202506_GetImageTranslationTasks_Response_Data_TranslationTasks_OriginalImage | no | Product_202506_GetImageTranslationTasks_Response_Data_TranslationTasks_OriginalImage |  |
| data.translation_tasks[].original_image.uri | string | no |  | The URI of the original image. |
| data.translation_tasks[].original_image.url | string | no |  | The URL of the original image. |
| data.translation_tasks[].status | string | no |  | The translation result. Possible values: - PROCESSING: Translation is underway and has not yet completed. - COMPLETED: Translation has completed and results are ready. - FAILED: Translation did not complete due to an error. |
| data.translation_tasks[].target_language | string | no |  | The target language to translate the image into. Possible values: - de-DE - en-IE - es-ES - fr-FR - it-IT |
| data.translation_tasks[].translated_image | Product_202506_GetImageTranslationTasks_Response_Data_TranslationTasks_TranslatedImage | no | Product_202506_GetImageTranslationTasks_Response_Data_TranslationTasks_TranslatedImage |  |
| data.translation_tasks[].translated_image.uri | string | no |  | The URI of the translated image. |
| data.translation_tasks[].translated_image.url | string | no |  | The URL of the translated image. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### GET /product/202507/global_listing_rules

- Summary: GetGlobalListingRules
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Retrieves the global listing rules for a local shop that belongs to a global seller. E.g. The supported listing methods or the inventory allocation rules. The rules differ by the markets they serve. **Note**: Applicable only for global sellers.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Product_202507_GetGlobalListingRules_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Product_202507_GetGlobalListingRules_Response_Data | no | Product_202507_GetGlobalListingRules_Response_Data |  |
| data.inventory_rules | array<Product_202507_GetGlobalListingRules_Response_Data_InventoryRules> | no |  | A list of inventory allocation rules for all warehouses linked to the shop. |
| data.inventory_rules[].allocation_mode | string | no |  | The inventory allocation mode used for this warehouse in the local market. `SHARED` – Inventory is pooled across all covered markets. An inventory deduction in one market reflects across all. `DYNAMIC` – Inventory is divided proportionally among covered mar... |
| data.inventory_rules[].associated_warehouses | array<Product_202507_GetGlobalListingRules_Response_Data_InventoryRules_AssociatedWarehouses> | no |  | The list of markets where inventory from this warehouse is shared or dynamically allocated. **Note**: Applicable only for `SHARED` and `DYNAMIC` management modes. |
| data.inventory_rules[].associated_warehouses[].region | string | no |  | The country where the warehouse is located. |
| data.inventory_rules[].associated_warehouses[].warehouse_id | string | no |  | The associated warehouse ID. |
| data.inventory_rules[].local_warehouse_id | string | no |  | The warehouse ID associated with the shop. |
| data.listing_methods | array<string> | no |  | The methods at which sellers can list products in this shop. Possible values: - GLOBAL_PUBLISHING: Create a global product, then publish it to target local markets. - LOCAL_REPLICATION: Create local product, then replicate it to other target local markets. |
| data.listing_methods[] | string | no |  |  |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### PUT /product/202509/products/{product_id}

- Summary: EditProduct
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Edit all properties (e.g. description, brand, images) of an existing product that is not in the `FREEZE` or `DELETED` state. After editing the product, the latest product content (referred to as v2) will be resent for audit review. If the audit passes, v2 is published to the shop, otherwise, the existing product stays live and remains unchanged (keeping v1). However, edits to the `price` or `inventory` fields do not require a reaudit and will be immediately published on the platform. Use the [Product status change](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650956aff1fd3102b90b6261) webhook ...
- Request schema: `Product_202509_EditProduct_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202509_EditProduct_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| product_id | path | yes | string | The product ID generated by TikTok Shop. |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

### POST /product/202509/products/{product_id}/partial_edit

- Summary: PartialEditProduct
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Edit some properties (e.g. description, images, attributes) of a product that is not in the `FREEZE` or `DELETED` state. After editing the product, the latest product content (referred to as v2) will be resent for audit review. If the audit passes, v2 is published to the shop, otherwise, the existing product stays live and remains unchanged (keeping v1). However, edits to the `price` or `inventory` fields do not require a reaudit and will be immediately published on the platform. Use the [Product status change](650956aff1fd3102b90b6261) webhook to keep track of the review status. **Note**: ...
- Request schema: `Product_202509_PartialEditProduct_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202509_PartialEditProduct_Response`

| product_id | path | yes | string | The product ID in TikTok Shop. |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

## product_v202601

| method | path | summary |
| --- | --- | --- |
| POST | `/product/202601/compliance/auditing/research` | ProductAuditingResearch |

### POST /product/202601/compliance/auditing/research

- Summary: ProductAuditingResearch
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: For compliant vendor to rescan all of the product information so that the compliant vendor can issue a compliance testing report.
- Request schema: `Product_202601_ProductAuditingResearch_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202601_ProductAuditingResearch_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| page_token | query | no | string | returned by the current page, and for the first page, it is an empty string. |
| page_size | query | yes | integer:int64 | The number of results to be returned per page. Valid range: [1-50] |
| category_asset_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| brand_ids | array<string> | no |  | The ID of the brand of this product. |
| brand_ids[] | string | no |  |  |
| category_ids | array<string> | no |  | The category id of the source product included in the virtual bundle. |
| category_ids[] | string | no |  |  |
| product_ids | array<string> | no |  | The product ID generated by TikTok Shop. Max is 20 |
| product_ids[] | string | no |  |  |
| product_title | string | no |  | The product title. Title length: - DE, ES, FR, IE, IT, JP, UK, US: [1, 255] - BR, MX: [1, 300] - Other regions: [25, 255] |
| seller_id | string | no |  | The Shop identity ID. |
| seller_name | string | no |  | The name of the shop which product belongs to. |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Product_202601_ProductAuditingResearch_Response_Data | no | Product_202601_ProductAuditingResearch_Response_Data |  |
| data.next_page_token | string | no |  | Obtain the transmission parameters for the next page data |
| data.products | array<Product_202601_ProductAuditingResearch_Response_Data_Products> | no |  | Product information |
| data.products[].brand_id | string | no |  | The ID of the brand of this product. |
| data.products[].brand_name | string | no |  | The brand name. |
| data.products[].categories | array<Product_202601_ProductAuditingResearch_Response_Data_Products_Categories> | no |  | The category tree information of the source product included in the virtual bundle. |
| data.products[].categories[].id | string | no |  | The ID of the category of this product. |
| data.products[].categories[].is_leaf | boolean | no |  | A flag to indicate if the category is a leaf category. Note: You can only create or edit products that belong to a leaf category. |

| data.products[].categories[].name | string | no |  | The name of the category in the country where the shop operates. |

### POST /product/202602/packages/recommend

### POST /product/202604/appeals/submit

- Summary: SubmitAppealTask
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: #### Appeal Size Chart Verification Initiates an appeal process for a product that was blocked during the listing phase due to a size chart verification failure. This API is used when a seller believes their product was incorrectly blocked by our automated size chart validation system. The validation checks for three potential issues: 1. Whether the size chart contains all mandatory dimensions. 2. Whether the size chart covers all Stock-Keeping Units (SKUs) for sale. 3. Whether the numerical values within the size chart are valid. If the validation system detects an issue, the product listi...
- Request schema: `Product_202604_SubmitAppealTask_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202604_SubmitAppealTask_Response`

| name | in | required | type | description |

| appeal_message.field_name | string | no |  | The target fields to appeal. Possible values: - APPEAL_MESSAGE_FIELD_SIZE_CHART |
| appeal_message.indicator_details | array<Product_202604_SubmitAppealTask_RequestBody_AppealMessage_IndicatorDetails> | no |  | Indicator details of the products submitted for appeal |
| appeal_message.indicator_details[].indicator_type | string | no |  | The target indicator_type to appeal of this field. Possible values: - REQUIRED_DIMENSION：Does the size chart include all required dimensions? - CONTAINS_ALL_SALE_PROPERTY：Does the size chart cover all sales attributes?"" - VALUE_RANGE_OUT_OF_RANGE：Are the v... |
| appeal_message.size_chart_id | string | no |  | size_chart_id |

### POST /product/202604/inventory/operation/settings

- Summary: UpdateStockOperationSettings

### POST /product/202604/opportunities/query

- Summary: ListOpportunity
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Search and retrieve a paginated list of opportunity leads available to the authorized seller, with optional filters by type, status, category, etc and ordered by the algorithm ranking model.
- Request schema: `Product_202604_ListOpportunity_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202604_ListOpportunity_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| page_size | query | yes | integer:int32 | Number of results per page. Max: 100. Default: 20. |
| page_token | query | no | string | Pagination token from previous response. Omit for first page. |
| locale | query | no | string | Expressed using {language_code}-{COUNTRY_CODE}, in accordance with the BCP-47 standard. |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| category_ids | array<string> | no |  | Filter by category IDs. Leave empty to return all leads that available to the seller. |
| category_ids[] | string | no |  |  |
| create_time_ge | integer:int64 | no |  | Filter opportunities created after this time. timestamp in seconds |
| create_time_lt | integer:int64 | no |  | Filter opportunities created before this time. timestamp in seconds |
| opportunity_type | string | no |  | Type of opportunity: PRODUCT（品线索）/ KEYWORD（词线索）/ CATEGORY（类目线索） |

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| data.data.opportunities[].category_id_level_3 | string | no |  | TikTok Shop L3 category ID. |

| data.data.opportunities[].est_market_sales_volume | string | no |  | Estimated overall market sales volume. |
| data.data.opportunities[].expire_time | integer:int64 | no |  | Opportunity expiry date, second-level timestamp |
| data.data.opportunities[].id | string | no |  | Unique ID of the opportunity |
| data.data.opportunities[].is_collected | boolean | no |  | Whether it has been collected |
| data.data.opportunities[].opportunity_type | string | no |  | Type of opportunity: PRODUCT（品线索）/ KEYWORD（词线索）/ CATEGORY（类目线索） Empty return for a specific opportunity type indicates the business team has not enabled merchant submission for this lead type in the corresponding market. |

| data.data.opportunities[].title | string | no |  | Opportunity title. |

### GET /product/202604/opportunities/submissions

| page_size | query | yes | integer:int32 | Number of results per page. Max: 100. Default: 20. |

| data.opportunity.market_data.search_keyword | string | no |  | TikTok Shop in-site user search keyword. |
| data.opportunity.market_data.search_volume | string | no |  | TikTok Shop in-site user search volume. |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### POST /product/202604/opportunities/{opportunity_id}/submit

- Summary: SubmitProductviaOpportunity
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Submit an existing product (already listed on TikTok Shop) as a response to a specific opportunity lead. The product will be linked to the opportunity and enter the standard submission review flow. If you need to list a new product to meet the opportunity lead, you must first request the product release API to create the product_id , and then submit the product to link the opportunity lead.
- Request schema: `Product_202604_SubmitProductviaOpportunity_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Product_202604_SubmitProductviaOpportunity_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| opportunity_id | path | yes | string | The opportunity lead to respond to. |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| product_id | string | no |  | The TikTok Shop product ID to submit. Must be in ACTIVATE status. |

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | Product_202604_SubmitProductviaOpportunity_Response_Data | no | Product_202604_SubmitProductviaOpportunity_Response_Data |  |
| data.submission | Product_202604_SubmitProductviaOpportunity_Response_Data_Submission | no | Product_202604_SubmitProductviaOpportunity_Response_Data_Submission |  |
| data.submission.id | string | no |  | Unique ID of this submission record. Use for tracking review status. |
| data.submission.opportunity_id | string | no |  | The opportunity ID this submission is linked to. |
| data.submission.product_id | string | no |  | The submitted product ID. |
| data.submission.rejection_reason | string | no |  | the reason when the status is REJECTED |
| data.submission.status | string | no |  | APPROVED, UNDER_REVIEW, REJECTED are supported. Initial submission status: PENDING_REVIEW. |
| data.submission.submit_time | integer:int64 | no |  | Submission timestamp. second-level timestamp |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### POST /product/202604/products/gpa_upgrade_task

- Summary: CreateGPAUpgradeTask
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: This interface is only available for EU L2L sellers. The interface is used to upgrade products on EU interconnection. After the upgrade, products can be managed using the new interface, but not using interfaces related to Global Product.
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Product_202604_CreateGPAUpgradeTask_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

#### Response Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | integer:int32 | no |  | The success or failure status code returned in API response. |
| data | object | no |  |  |
| data | object | no |  |  |
| message | string | no |  | The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message. |
| request_id | string | no |  | Request log. |

### POST /promotion/202309/activities

- Summary: CreateActivity
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Use this API to create a product discount activity or a flash deal activity. You cannot create a coupon activity with this API. To do that, you'll need to go to the seller center or the seller app. To update the products or SKUs included in the activity, use [Update Activity Product](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650d32c42aaa3602b86ccb5c).
- Request schema: `Promotion_202309_CreateActivity_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Promotion_202309_CreateActivity_Response`

### POST /promotion/202309/activities/search

- Summary: SearchActivities
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Get a list of product discount or flash deal promotion activities. For coupon activities, use [Search Coupons](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6699dcdf115ebe02f841e4cd).

### GET /promotion/202309/activities/{activity_id}

- Summary: GetActivity
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Get the details of a product discount or flash deal promotion activity. Product information for `FIXED_PRICE`, `DIRECT_DISCOUNT` and `FLASHSALE` activity that ended more than 180 days will not be returned.For coupon activities, use [Get Coupon](6699dce0de15e502ed219e37).
- Request schema: `-`
- Response schema: `Promotion_202309_GetActivity_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| activity_id | path | yes | string | Activity ID |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

_None._

### PUT /promotion/202309/activities/{activity_id}

- Summary: UpdateActivity
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Change the title and the beginning and end time of the existing product discount or flash sale promotion activity.
- Request schema: `Promotion_202309_UpdateActivity_RequestBody`

### PUT /promotion/202309/activities/{activity_id}/products

- Summary: UpdateActivityProduct
- Operation ID: `-`
- Description: Use this API to add the products or SKUs to the list of a product discount activity or a flash deal activity. You can also change the discounts on existing products or SKUs. To remove the products or SKUs from the list, use [Remove Activity Product](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/650acfd84a0bb702c072b4eb).
- Request schema: `Promotion_202309_UpdateActivityProduct_RequestBody`
- Response schema: `Promotion_202309_UpdateActivityProduct_Response`

#### Parameters

| name | in | required | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| activity_id | path | yes | string | Activity ID |
| shop_cipher | query | no | string |  |
| x-tts-access-token | header | yes | string |  |
| Content-Type | header | yes | string | Allowed type: application/json |

#### Request Fields

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| activity_id | string | no |  | A unique ID that identifies activities. You cannot update the products in `DEACTIVATED` or `EXPIRED` activities. |
| benefit_product_ids | array<string> | no |  | TikTokShop product ID list. |
| benefit_product_ids[] | string | no |  |  |
| exclude_product_ids | array<string> | no |  | IDs of the BXGY exclude products to remove. Max count: 100. |
| exclude_product_ids[] | string | no |  |  |
| products | array<Promotion_202309_UpdateActivityProduct_RequestBody_Products> | no |  | The items to add to the list or the existing items in the list of promotion activity to edit. The length must not exceed `300`. |
| products[].activity_price_amount | string | no |  | Deal price. You must specify the value when `product_level==PRODUCT` and `activity_type==FIXED_PRICE / FLASHSALE`. The currency is the same between activity price and product price. |
| products[].discount | string | no |  | Discount value. If the product is 10% off, the value is `10`. You must specify the value when `product_level==PRODUCT` and `activity_type==DIRECT_DISCOUNT`; and you must not specify it when it's not. |
| products[].id | string | no |  | TikTok Shop product ID |
| products[].quantity_limit | integer:int32 | no |  | The quantity limit of the products involved in the activity. The range is `[1, 99]`, or you can use `-1` for unlimited. If you are updating the value of an existing product, the value cannot be less than the current value. When `product_level==VARIATION`, y... |
| products[].quantity_per_user | integer:int32 | no |  | Limit of product purchase per buyer. The range is `[1, 99]`, or you can use `-1` for unlimited. If you are updating the value of an existing product, the value cannot be less than the current value. When `product_level==VARIATION`, you must specify `-1`. |
| products[].skus | array<Promotion_202309_UpdateActivityProduct_RequestBody_Products_Skus> | no |  | The SKUs to add to the list or to edit. The number of the SKUs across all products must not exceed 300 in an API call. You must specify the value to `[]` when `product_level==PRODUCT`. |
| products[].skus[].activity_price_amount | string | no |  | Deal price. You must specify the value when `product_level==VARIATION` and `activity_type==FIXED_PRICE / FLASHSALE`. The currency of activity price is the same as that of SKU price. |
| products[].skus[].discount | string | no |  | Discount value. If the SKU is 10% off, the value is `10`. You must specify the value when `product_level==VARIATION` and `activity_type==DIRECT_DISCOUNT`. |
| products[].skus[].id | string | no |  | SKU ID |
| products[].skus[].quantity_limit | integer:int32 | no |  | The quantity limit of the SKU involved in the activity. The range is `[1, 99]`, or you can use `-1` for unlimited. If you are updating the value of an existing SKU, the value cannot be decreased. |
| products[].skus[].quantity_per_user | integer:int32 | no |  | Limit of SKU purchase per buyer. The range is `[1, 99]`, or you can use `-1` for unlimited. If you are updating the value of an existing SKU, the value cannot be decreased. |

| field | type | required | schema | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
